description: HELIX Chain Immune Library - 500 attack signatures across 10 canonical attack classes

signatures.name: The DAO Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: External call before state update; recursive withdrawal drains funds
signatures.fix: Apply checks-effects-interactions; add reentrancy guard

signatures.name: Parity Multisig Freeze
signatures.root_cause: Library contract had public init; attacker became owner and killed it
signatures.fix: Use initializer modifier; never expose init on library

signatures.name: bZx Flash Loan
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated oracle price for undercollateralized borrow
signatures.fix: Use TWAP oracle; add flash loan detection

signatures.name: Harvest Finance
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated Curve pool price; vault minted excess shares
signatures.fix: Use TWAP; add deposit delay; check share price deviation

signatures.name: PancakeBunny
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan inflated LP price; performance fee calculated on manipulated price
signatures.fix: Use TWAP for fee calculation

signatures.name: Cream Finance V1
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan + self-referential token pricing created infinite borrowing loop
signatures.fix: Block self-referential token as collateral

signatures.name: Wormhole Bridge
signatures.root_cause: Signature verification bypassed due to deprecated Solana sysvar
signatures.fix: Use current verification methods; add guardian checks

signatures.name: Ronin Bridge
signatures.root_cause: 5 of 9 validator keys compromised; threshold too low
signatures.fix: Increase multisig threshold; hardware security modules

signatures.name: Beanstalk Governance
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan acquired governance tokens; passed malicious proposal in single tx
signatures.fix: Add timelock; snapshot voting; minimum holding period

signatures.name: Harmony Bridge
signatures.root_cause: 2-of-5 multisig compromised; threshold critically low
signatures.fix: Raise threshold to 4-of-5; add execution delay

signatures.name: Nomad Bridge
signatures.root_cause: Upgrade set trusted root to 0x00; any message became valid
signatures.fix: Validate trusted root != zero; comprehensive upgrade testing

signatures.name: Wintermute
signatures.root_cause: Vanity address generated with Profanity tool; private key derivable
signatures.fix: Never use Profanity; use secure key generation

signatures.name: Mango Markets
signatures.root_cause: Spot price oracle manipulated with large trades; inflated collateral value
signatures.fix: Use TWAP; add price impact limits; circuit breakers

signatures.name: FTX/Alameda
signatures.root_cause: Commingled customer funds; no on-chain transparency
signatures.fix: On-chain proof of reserves; segregated wallets

signatures.name: Euler Finance
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan + donate created bad debt; liquidation mechanism exploited
signatures.fix: Add access control to donate; check health factor

signatures.name: Multichain Bridge
signatures.root_cause: MPC server compromised; admin keys controlled bridge funds
signatures.fix: Decentralize key management; add withdrawal limits

signatures.name: Curve Vyper Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Vyper compiler bug in reentrancy lock; read-only reentrancy via callback
signatures.fix: Update Vyper compiler; add cross-function reentrancy guard

signatures.name: Stake.com
signatures.root_cause: Hot wallet private keys compromised
signatures.fix: Cold storage; multi-layer withdrawal approval

signatures.name: KyberSwap Elastic
signatures.root_cause: Tick boundary manipulation; cross-tick swap logic flaw in concentrated liquidity
signatures.fix: Add tick boundary validation; comprehensive edge-case testing

signatures.name: Socket Gateway
signatures.root_cause: New route contract had unvalidated user input; arbitrary call drained approved tokens
signatures.fix: Whitelist call targets; validate inputs; audit new routes

signatures.name: Fei/Rari Fuse Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Cross-contract reentrancy across Fuse pool; exitMarket callback before state update
signatures.fix: Add reentrancy guard to all external-facing functions

signatures.name: Siren Protocol
signatures.root_cause: ERC-777 token callback enabled reentrancy during reward claim
signatures.fix: Use nonReentrant modifier; avoid ERC-777 hooks

signatures.name: DFX Finance
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan callback allowed reentrant deposit before balance check
signatures.fix: Add reentrancy lock around flash functions

signatures.name: Platypus Finance
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated stablecoin pool ratio; emergencyWithdraw bypassed solvency check
signatures.fix: Check solvency after emergency withdraw; add flash loan guard

signatures.name: DODO V2
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan re-initialized pool with attacker tokens; drained reserves
signatures.fix: Prevent re-initialization; add initialized flag

signatures.name: Bonq Protocol
signatures.root_cause: Tellor oracle staking too low; attacker submitted false price with minimal stake
signatures.fix: Require higher oracle stake; add price deviation checks

signatures.name: Lodestar Finance
signatures.root_cause: plvGLP oracle price manipulated; borrowed against inflated collateral
signatures.fix: Use established oracle; add collateral factor limits

signatures.name: Inverse Finance
signatures.root_cause: Used spot SushiSwap LP price as oracle; flash loan manipulated reserves
signatures.fix: Use Chainlink TWAP; never rely on spot DEX prices

signatures.name: Poly Network
signatures.root_cause: Cross-chain message could call any contract; changed keeper to attacker address
signatures.fix: Whitelist callable contracts; separate keeper management

signatures.name: Qubit Finance
signatures.root_cause: QBridge accepted ETH deposit on BSC without actual ETH transfer; minted unbacked tokens
signatures.fix: Validate actual token transfer occurred before minting

signatures.name: Li Finance (LiFi)
signatures.root_cause: Arbitrary call data passed to swap function; attacker called transferFrom on approved tokens
signatures.fix: Whitelist swap targets; validate calldata

signatures.name: Atomic Wallet
signatures.root_cause: Client-side key derivation vulnerability; encrypted keys extractable
signatures.fix: Use hardware wallet; proper key encryption at rest

signatures.name: CoinEx
signatures.root_cause: Hot wallet private keys leaked; attributed to Lazarus Group
signatures.fix: Cold storage majority; multi-approval withdrawals

signatures.name: BeautyChain (BEC)
signatures.root_cause: uint256 multiplication overflow created tokens from nothing (pre-SafeMath)
signatures.fix: Use SafeMath or Solidity >=0.8.0 checked arithmetic

signatures.name: SMT Token
signatures.root_cause: Integer overflow in fee calculation; transferred max uint256 tokens
signatures.fix: Use SafeMath; validate fee < amount

signatures.name: PoWHC
signatures.root_cause: Integer underflow in balance; sold tokens without owning them
signatures.fix: Use SafeMath; check balance >= amount before subtraction

signatures.name: Compound Governance Token Distribution
signatures.root_cause: Proposal upgraded distributor with inverted comparison; over-distributed COMP
signatures.fix: Comprehensive testing of upgrade proposals; staged rollout

signatures.name: Cover Protocol
signatures.root_cause: Infinite mint via shield token deposit/withdraw loop
signatures.fix: Add mint cap; validate token economics invariants

signatures.name: Level Finance
signatures.root_cause: Referral reward used unchecked claim counter; repeated claims drained pool
signatures.fix: Track claimed rewards per user; add claim limits

signatures.name: Sentiment Protocol
signatures.root_cause: Balancer read-only reentrancy manipulated account health during liquidation
signatures.fix: Add reentrancy guard to view functions; cache health factor

signatures.name: Merlin DEX
signatures.root_cause: Owner drained LP via privileged emergency function despite audit
signatures.fix: Timelock on emergency functions; multi-sig required

signatures.name: Defrost Finance
signatures.root_cause: Owner changed oracle to fake one; liquidated all positions at manipulated price
signatures.fix: Timelock on oracle changes; immutable oracle after launch

signatures.name: Compounder Finance
signatures.root_cause: Migrate function moved all funds to owner; no timelock or governance
signatures.fix: Remove migrate function; or add timelock + community vote

signatures.name: Tornado Cash Governance
signatures.root_cause: Malicious proposal hid CREATE2 contract that granted attacker 1.2M votes via selfdestruct/redeploy
signatures.fix: Review proposal code thoroughly; add proposal simulation

signatures.name: Build Finance DAO
signatures.root_cause: Attacker acquired majority tokens cheaply; passed proposal to drain treasury
signatures.fix: Higher quorum requirements; treasury spending limits per proposal

signatures.name: Fortress Protocol
signatures.root_cause: Oracle manipulation enabled attacker to submit false collateral values via governance
signatures.fix: Separate oracle updates from governance; add price bounds

signatures.name: pNetwork
signatures.root_cause: Incorrect signature validation in cross-chain message; attacker forged withdrawal proof
signatures.fix: Multi-validator signature; add withdrawal delay

signatures.name: THORChain #1
signatures.root_cause: ETH bifrost accepted fake deposit events; credited funds without actual transfer
signatures.fix: Verify actual balance change; not just events

signatures.name: Meter.io Bridge
signatures.root_cause: Native BNB deposits bypassed ERC20 amount check; minted excess wrapped tokens
signatures.fix: Separate native and ERC20 deposit paths; validate amounts

signatures.name: Multichain (anyCall)
signatures.root_cause: anyCall callback executed arbitrary function on target; no caller validation
signatures.fix: Validate callback source; whitelist executable functions

signatures.name: Harvest Finance USDC/USDT Drain
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated Curve pool price; fUSDT/fUSDC vault calculated share price from spot reserves
signatures.fix: Use TWAP oracle for share price; add deposit/withdraw delay; cap single-block deposits

signatures.name: Alpha Homora v2 Iron Bank Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Repeated borrow-and-deposit cycle between Alpha Homora and Iron Bank; sUSD pool manipulation inflated collateral
signatures.fix: Add per-protocol borrow caps; verify collateral value independently; limit cross-protocol recursive borrows

signatures.name: Warp Finance LP Collateral Attack
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan skewed Uniswap LP token reserves; LP price used as collateral valuation was inflated
signatures.fix: Use fair LP pricing formula (Alpha Finance method); never use spot reserves for collateral valuation

signatures.name: Spartan Protocol LP Share Drain
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan inflated pool balance; LP share calculation used manipulated pool state; more tokens withdrawn than deposited
signatures.fix: Calculate LP shares using time-weighted reserves; add invariant checks on remove liquidity

signatures.name: ValueDeFi MultiStables Vault
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated Curve 3pool; vault share calculation relied on manipulable spot reserves
signatures.fix: Use Curve virtual_price with validation; implement deposit caps; add oracle crosscheck

signatures.name: Cheese Bank Oracle Attack
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated Uniswap reserve ratio; lending protocol used spot Uniswap price as oracle
signatures.fix: Use Uniswap TWAP oracle; add price deviation circuit breaker; minimum observation window

signatures.name: Belt Finance BSC Vault Drain
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan exploited strategy balance calculation in 4Belt pool; repeated deposit-withdraw extracted value from vault
signatures.fix: Lock strategy balance during single transaction; snapshot-based share calculation; flash loan guard

signatures.name: Uranium Finance Migration Bug
signatures.root_cause: Migration from v2 to v2.1 introduced balance calculation bug; swap output multiplied by 100 instead of maintaining constant product
signatures.fix: Formal verification of AMM invariant during migration; never modify core swap math without full audit; migration freeze period

signatures.name: ApeRocket BSC Flash Loan
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated CAKE vault; reward calculation used spot vault share price; inflated rewards extracted
signatures.fix: Use time-weighted average for reward calculation; add minimum staking duration before claiming rewards

signatures.name: Balancer Pool Drain STA Token
signatures.root_cause: Deflationary token (STA) with transfer fee broke Balancer pool invariant; repeated swaps drained pool via rounding
signatures.fix: Explicitly check token balance before and after transfer; reject fee-on-transfer tokens or adjust pool math

signatures.name: Platypus Finance Solvency Bypass
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan deposited large amount; emergencyWithdraw did not check debt position; solvency check bypassed
signatures.fix: Check debt position in all withdrawal paths including emergency; add flash loan guards to emergency functions

signatures.name: Yearn v1 yDAI Vault Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated 3crv virtual_price via large Curve deposit; yDAI vault priced shares using manipulated virtual_price
signatures.fix: Validate virtual_price against historical bounds; add manipulation-resistant pricing; cap single-block earn() calls

signatures.name: Poly Network Cross-Chain Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Attacker crafted cross-chain message to call EthCrossChainData contract; changed keeper role to attacker-controlled address
signatures.fix: Restrict callable target contracts; never allow cross-chain messages to modify access control; whitelist function selectors

signatures.name: Wormhole VAA Signature Bypass
signatures.root_cause: Deprecated Solana secp256k1 instruction allowed forged guardian signature verification; VAA validation bypassed
signatures.fix: Use current verified secp256k1 program; validate instruction sysvar against active program; add guardian set version check

signatures.name: Wintermute Profanity Vanity Address
signatures.root_cause: Vanity address generated by Profanity tool; tool used weak PRNG allowing private key recovery from public key
signatures.fix: Never use Profanity or similar weak vanity generators; migrate funds from vanity addresses; use hardware-generated keys only

signatures.name: Badger DAO Frontend Injection
signatures.root_cause: Cloudflare API key compromised; attacker injected malicious script into frontend; tricked users into approving unlimited token spend
signatures.fix: CSP headers; subresource integrity; approval amount limits; monitoring for unusual approval patterns

signatures.name: dForce imBTC ERC-777 Exploit
signatures.root_cause: ERC-777 token callback allowed reentrancy via tokensReceived hook; lending pool did not account for ERC-777 hooks
signatures.fix: Guard against ERC-777 callbacks in lending functions; use reentrancy guard; check token standard before listing

signatures.name: Compound Comptroller Proposal 62
signatures.root_cause: Governance proposal 62 introduced bug in COMP distribution; excess COMP distributed to wrong addresses; timelock prevented immediate fix
signatures.fix: Staged rollout for governance changes; simulation before execution; emergency pause mechanism independent of timelock

signatures.name: Parity Wallet initWallet Attack
signatures.root_cause: Multisig wallet initWallet function was public and unguarded; attacker re-initialized ownership and drained funds
signatures.fix: Add initialized flag; use constructor or initializer modifier; restrict init to deployer only

signatures.name: Cashio Infinite Mint Root Bypass
signatures.root_cause: Collateral validation only checked first level of account chain; attacker created nested fake accounts that bypassed root verification
signatures.fix: Validate entire account derivation chain; verify collateral account against known roots; add mint rate limits

signatures.name: Level Finance Referral Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Referral reward claim function did not verify caller was the actual referrer; anyone could claim pending referral rewards
signatures.fix: Verify msg.sender matches referrer address; add nonce-based claim tracking; prevent double-claims

signatures.name: Ragnarok Online Token Proxy Takeover
signatures.root_cause: UUPS proxy upgrade function lacked onlyOwner modifier in implementation; attacker called upgrade to malicious implementation
signatures.fix: Always add access control to upgrade functions; use OpenZeppelin UUPSUpgradeable with _authorizeUpgrade; verify upgrade authorization

signatures.name: Socket Gateway Approval Drain
signatures.root_cause: Newly added route contract had unvalidated user input passed to arbitrary call; attacker drained approved tokens
signatures.fix: Whitelist call targets; validate all user inputs; audit all new route additions; add approval limits per route

signatures.name: Cream Finance v1 AMP Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: AMP token (ERC-777-like) callback on transfer allowed reentrancy during borrow; second borrow executed before first updated state
signatures.fix: Add reentrancy guard to borrow; check token type before listing; update state before external calls

signatures.name: Fei Protocol Rari Fuse Pool Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Cross-function reentrancy via CEther fallback; exitMarket called during borrow callback removed collateral check
signatures.fix: Unified reentrancy lock across all market functions; check-effects-interactions on all entry points

signatures.name: Eminence Finance Gaming Token
signatures.root_cause: Bonding curve contract allowed flash mint and sell; reentrancy via token transfer callback during bonding curve interaction
signatures.fix: Reentrancy guard on bonding curve buy/sell; update reserves before token transfers

signatures.name: Revest Finance FNFT Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: ERC-1155 onERC1155Received callback during FNFT minting; attacker re-entered to mint additional FNFTs pointing to same deposit
signatures.fix: Reentrancy guard on minting; update FNFT registry before minting tokens; validate deposit linkage

signatures.name: DFX Finance Curve Pool Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan callback function allowed calling withdraw during flash; state not updated before callback execution
signatures.fix: Update state before flash callback; add reentrancy guard across flash and withdraw functions

signatures.name: Read-Only Reentrancy Pattern
signatures.root_cause: View function read stale state during reentrancy window; external protocol used this view function as price oracle; stale price exploited
signatures.fix: Add reentrancy lock that also blocks view functions; use reentrancy-aware oracle; validate price bounds

signatures.name: Sentiment Protocol Balancer Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Balancer flash loan callback allowed re-entering Sentiment lending pool; collateral valuation read from Balancer pool in inconsistent state
signatures.fix: Add reentrancy guard; do not read external pool state during callback; snapshot collateral before flash loan

signatures.name: Grim Finance Vault Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: depositFor allowed specifying different receiver; token with transfer callback re-entered deposit; vault shares minted multiple times for single deposit
signatures.fix: Reentrancy guard; compute shares before transfer; verify actual balance change after transfer

signatures.name: Jarvis Synthereum Read Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Cross-contract read-only reentrancy; price feed read from pool in mid-transaction state; synthetic token redeemed at stale rate
signatures.fix: Reentrancy-aware price feeds; validate rate bounds; lock price oracle during state transitions

signatures.name: Vyper Compiler Curve Pool Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Vyper compiler 0.2.15-0.3.0 bug: @nonreentrant lock did not protect cross-function calls; reentrancy guard storage slot collision
signatures.fix: Upgrade Vyper beyond 0.3.0; add protocol-level reentrancy guard independent of compiler; audit compiler version

signatures.name: Cover Protocol Infinite Mint
signatures.root_cause: State not properly reset after claim; attacker could repeatedly claim and mint COVER tokens; shield mining logic flaw
signatures.fix: Reset all related state variables in single atomic operation; add claim cooldown; verify mint limits

signatures.name: Compound cToken Rounding Error
signatures.root_cause: Exchange rate calculation had rounding error when total supply was near zero; first depositor could manipulate exchange rate to extract value from subsequent depositors
signatures.fix: Mint dead shares on first deposit; use virtual offset for exchange rate; minimum initial deposit requirement

signatures.name: Indexed Finance NDEX Weight Manipulation
signatures.root_cause: Index rebalancing weight calculation used approximate formula; large swap skewed weights beyond intended bounds; arbitrage drained underweighted tokens
signatures.fix: Use exact weight calculations; add maximum single-swap size limits; circuit breaker on weight deviation

signatures.name: MonoX Finance Single-Sided Pool Bug
signatures.root_cause: MONO token price updated during swap used both as input and output token; same token acted as tokenIn and tokenOut inflating its own price
signatures.fix: Prevent same token as input and output; use independent price source; validate swap invariant post-swap

signatures.name: Hundred Finance Compound Fork ERC-4626
signatures.root_cause: Empty market exchange rate manipulation via ERC-4626 donation attack; attacker donated tokens to inflate exchange rate then redeemed at inflated rate
signatures.fix: Enforce minimum collateral; virtual shares for exchange rate; reject operations on empty markets

signatures.name: Team Finance Token Migration Lock
signatures.root_cause: V2 to V3 migration function allowed specifying custom Uniswap pool parameters; attacker set extreme price to extract locked liquidity at favorable rate
signatures.fix: Fix migration parameters; validate target pool exists and has reasonable price; add migration whitelist

signatures.name: Beanstalk Vulnerability Via Pump-and-Dump Logic
signatures.root_cause: Season reward calculation based on instantaneous deltaB; attacker manipulated BEAN price before sunrise call to maximize seigniorage
signatures.fix: Use cumulative TWAP for deltaB; add manipulation resistance to sunrise; cap per-season seigniorage

signatures.name: Saddle Finance Swap Calculation Error
signatures.root_cause: Price calculation in metapool used inconsistent decimal handling between base pool and metapool LP tokens; arbitrage extracted excess value
signatures.fix: Normalize all decimals before calculation; validate output bounds; formal verification of metapool math

signatures.name: Multichain anyCall Permit Bypass
signatures.root_cause: anyCall v7 permit function could be called by anyone; call permission not properly gated; allowed unauthorized cross-chain execution
signatures.fix: Restrict anyExecute callers; validate call origin chain and sender; add nonce-based replay protection

signatures.name: Euler Finance Donation Attack
signatures.root_cause: donateToReserves allowed inflating debt without repayment check; combined with self-liquidation to extract collateral exceeding actual deposits
signatures.fix: Add access controls to donate functions; prevent self-liquidation; check health factor after donations

signatures.name: Bonq DAO AllianceBlock Oracle Attack
signatures.root_cause: TellorFlex oracle had low staking requirement; attacker staked minimum TRB and submitted false WALBT price; no dispute within window
signatures.fix: Require higher oracle staking; use multiple oracle sources; add price deviation circuit breaker; extend dispute window

signatures.name: Inverse Finance Oracle Manipulation
signatures.root_cause: Keep3r oracle used SushiSwap TWAP with short window; attacker manipulated SushiSwap pair across multiple blocks to move TWAP
signatures.fix: Increase TWAP observation window; use Chainlink as primary oracle; add price bounds validation

signatures.name: Rari Capital Fuse Pool Oracle Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Fuse pool oracle configuration used manipulable on-chain source; combined with reentrancy to exploit stale price during callback
signatures.fix: Use manipulation-resistant oracle; separate oracle update from lending operations; add oracle freshness check

signatures.name: Fortress Protocol BSC Oracle Attack
signatures.root_cause: Governance-controlled oracle allowed proposal to change price feed; attacker gained governance control and set arbitrary FTS price
signatures.fix: Decouple oracle from governance; use independent decentralized oracle; add price change rate limits

signatures.name: BonqDAO TellorFlex WALBT
signatures.root_cause: Second attack on same protocol; attacker submitted 0 price for WALBT; zero price triggered massive liquidations benefiting attacker
signatures.fix: Reject zero price submissions; add minimum price floor; circuit breaker on extreme price changes

signatures.name: Venus Protocol BSC BTC Oracle Error
signatures.root_cause: Chainlink oracle feed became stale during BSC network congestion; Venus continued using last known BTC price for collateral; price dropped 20% while oracle was stale
signatures.fix: Add oracle staleness check with heartbeat timeout; use fallback oracle; pause markets when oracle is stale

signatures.name: Lodestar Finance Fake plvGLP Price
signatures.root_cause: plvGLP oracle calculated price from manipulable on-chain GLP exchange rate; attacker inflated plvGLP price via large GLP deposit then borrowed against it
signatures.fix: Use manipulation-resistant pricing for LP derivative tokens; cap collateral factor for illiquid assets; add price deviation checks

signatures.name: Mango Markets MNGO Perp Manipulation
signatures.root_cause: Attacker pumped MNGO perpetual price with thin liquidity; used unrealized PnL as collateral to borrow all available assets
signatures.fix: Use TWAP for collateral valuation; cap unrealized PnL as collateral percentage; add position size limits relative to market liquidity

signatures.name: Aave V2 CRV Oracle Manipulation Attempt
signatures.root_cause: Attacker attempted to short CRV on Aave by borrowing against thin liquidity; relied on CRV price crash to profit; partially successful but left bad debt
signatures.fix: Dynamic risk parameters based on asset liquidity; cap borrowable amount relative to on-chain liquidity; bad debt socialization mechanism

signatures.name: Ronin Bridge Validator Key Theft
signatures.root_cause: Lazarus Group compromised 5 of 9 Ronin validator keys via spear-phishing; social engineering through fake job offer; Axie DAO key still authorized from legacy gas-free transaction agreement
signatures.fix: Increase validator count; hardware security modules; revoke legacy authorizations; implement key rotation schedule

signatures.name: Harmony Horizon Bridge Key Compromise
signatures.root_cause: 2-of-5 multisig threshold too low; attacker compromised 2 private keys; transactions signed and executed without other validators noticing
signatures.fix: Increase to 5-of-9 or higher threshold; geographic distribution of signers; time-delay on large withdrawals

signatures.name: Atomic Wallet Supply Chain Key Drain
signatures.root_cause: Wallet software compromised; private keys extracted from user devices; suspected supply chain attack on wallet update mechanism
signatures.fix: Reproducible builds; code signing verification; hardware wallet integration; key derivation in secure enclave

signatures.name: Stake.com Hot Wallet Drain
signatures.root_cause: Casino platform hot wallet private key compromised; suspected North Korean Lazarus Group; funds drained across Ethereum, BSC, and Polygon
signatures.fix: Minimize hot wallet balance; cold storage for majority of funds; transaction monitoring with auto-freeze; IP-based access control

signatures.name: CoinEx Hot Wallet Key Theft
signatures.root_cause: Exchange hot wallet private keys compromised; attributed to Lazarus Group; systematic drain across 20+ chains
signatures.fix: Hardware security modules for key storage; multi-party computation for signing; automated balance limits; real-time anomaly detection

signatures.name: Multichain MPC Key Centralization
signatures.root_cause: CEO held all MPC key shares; single point of failure; CEO detained by authorities; keys possibly compromised or inaccessible
signatures.fix: Distribute MPC shares across independent parties; dead-man switch; transparent custody proof; geographic and organizational key distribution

signatures.name: BitMart Exchange Hot Wallet Hack
signatures.root_cause: Exchange hot wallet private keys stolen; attacker systematically withdrew ERC-20 and BEP-20 tokens across two chains
signatures.fix: Cold storage majority policy; withdrawal rate limits; multi-sig for large transfers; real-time monitoring alerts

signatures.name: Heco Bridge & HTX Key Compromise
signatures.root_cause: Heco Chain bridge and HTX exchange hot wallet keys compromised simultaneously; suspected state-sponsored attack; funds drained from both systems
signatures.fix: Separate key management for bridge and exchange; hardware security modules; air-gapped signing; organizational key separation

signatures.name: Qubit Finance BSC Bridge Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Bridge deposit function accepted ETH address(0) as valid token; minted qXETH on BSC without actual ETH deposit; used fake collateral to borrow real assets
signatures.fix: Validate token address is non-zero and whitelisted; verify deposit transaction on source chain; add deposit amount validation

signatures.name: Meter Bridge Incorrect Deposit Handling
signatures.root_cause: Bridge handler wrapped native BNB then called deposit with calldata specifying different amount; handler did not verify msg.value matched calldata amount
signatures.fix: Verify msg.value matches calldata amount; use msg.value directly instead of calldata; add deposit verification

signatures.name: pNetwork pBTC Bridge Attack
signatures.root_cause: Bug in pNetwork bridge code allowed attacker to forge mint event on BSC; pBTC minted without corresponding BTC lock on Bitcoin chain
signatures.fix: Verify mint events against source chain proofs; add multi-validator confirmation; implement mint rate limits

signatures.name: THORChain Router Exploit July
signatures.root_cause: Router contract did not validate return value of ETH transfer; attacker created contract that reverted on receive but THORChain node still credited the swap
signatures.fix: Check transfer return value; verify balance change after transfer; use pull-over-push pattern for ETH transfers

signatures.name: THORChain Fake Token Deposit
signatures.root_cause: THORChain bifrost node did not verify ERC-20 token address matched memo; attacker deposited worthless token but memo claimed ETH deposit
signatures.fix: Validate token address matches memo declaration; verify token whitelist; add deposit verification against token contract

signatures.name: Li.Finance Aggregator Call Injection
signatures.root_cause: Pre-bridge swap function allowed arbitrary calldata to approved DEX contracts; attacker crafted calldata to call transferFrom on pre-approved tokens
signatures.fix: Whitelist function selectors for DEX calls; validate calldata does not contain transferFrom; limit approved token amounts

signatures.name: Orbit Chain Bridge Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Bridge validator keys compromised; attacker signed fraudulent withdrawal transactions; 7 of 10 signer keys obtained
signatures.fix: Increase signer threshold; hardware key management; time-delayed withdrawals for large amounts; anomaly detection on withdrawal patterns

signatures.name: Socket Cross-Chain Route Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Newly deployed bridge route contract accepted arbitrary calldata without validation; attacker called transferFrom on user-approved tokens via route contract
signatures.fix: Audit all new routes before deployment; restrict callable functions; implement route whitelisting; cap per-route transfer limits

signatures.name: Tornado Cash Governance Takeover
signatures.root_cause: Malicious proposal disguised as a normal update contained hidden code deploying a contract that granted attacker 10000 extra TORN votes via CREATE2; attacker gained majority governance control
signatures.fix: Require proposal code review period; transparency for all deployed contracts; vote escrow with time lock; executable proposal auditing

signatures.name: Beanstalk Governance Flash Loan Vote
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan acquired massive STALK governance tokens; emergencyCommit had no timelock; malicious BIP passed and executed in single transaction draining treasury
signatures.fix: Snapshot-based voting excluding flash-loaned tokens; timelock on all governance executions; quorum based on time-weighted holdings

signatures.name: Build Finance DAO Treasury Drain
signatures.root_cause: Attacker accumulated BUILD tokens cheaply; submitted proposal to mint unlimited tokens to attacker address; quorum too low; proposal passed and executed
signatures.fix: Increase quorum requirements; add proposal execution delay; cap mintable amount per proposal; emergency veto mechanism

signatures.name: Audius Governance Initialization Bug
signatures.root_cause: Governance proxy storage layout mismatch between proxy and implementation; initialize function callable again after upgrade; attacker re-initialized governance and passed malicious proposal
signatures.fix: Use OpenZeppelin initializer pattern correctly; verify storage layout compatibility on upgrade; add re-initialization guard

signatures.name: Compound Proposal 117 Drip Bug
signatures.root_cause: Proposal 117 intended to fix Proposal 62 bug but introduced new issue; drip function sent COMP to wrong reservoir; timelock prevented quick fix
signatures.fix: Test governance proposals on fork before submission; staged rollout; emergency guardian role; formal verification of proposal effects

signatures.name: Swerve Finance DAO Stale Governance
signatures.root_cause: DAO became inactive; attacker accumulated SWRV tokens cheaply from low liquidity; passed proposal to drain remaining treasury; no active community to vote against
signatures.fix: Require minimum active voter threshold; time-based treasury lock if governance inactive; sunset clause for abandoned protocols

signatures.name: Atlantis Loans BSC Governance Drain
signatures.root_cause: Protocol governance abandoned; attacker acquired majority tokens and passed proposal to upgrade cToken implementation to malicious contract draining all deposits
signatures.fix: Immutable core contracts; upgrade requires multi-party approval; community sunset procedures; emergency migration paths

signatures.name: True Seigniorage Dollar Governance
signatures.root_cause: Algorithmic stablecoin governance allowed instant epoch advancement; attacker accumulated tokens during low price; advanced epochs to trigger expansion and mint excess tokens
signatures.fix: Time-lock between epochs; cap expansion rate; require minimum participation for epoch advancement

signatures.name: AnubisDAO Token Rug Pull
signatures.root_cause: Project raised 13,556 ETH in bonding curve sale; deployer held LP tokens; liquidity removed 20 hours after launch; no lock on LP tokens
signatures.fix: Lock LP tokens in timelock contract; use third-party LP locker; require LP lock proof before community sale

signatures.name: Meerkat Finance BSC Rug
signatures.root_cause: Vault contracts used upgradeable proxy; deployer upgraded to malicious implementation that drained all deposited funds; claimed it was an exploit
signatures.fix: Renounce proxy ownership; use timelocked upgrades; require multi-sig for upgrade; third-party audit before deployment

signatures.name: Squid Game Token Exit Scam
signatures.root_cause: Token contract had anti-sell mechanism preventing holders from selling; only deployer could sell; deployer sold all tokens at peak price draining liquidity pool
signatures.fix: Verify sell functionality before buying; check contract for owner-only functions; automated anti-rug scanners

signatures.name: Compounder Finance Backdoor Withdrawal
signatures.root_cause: Yield farming protocol had hidden owner-only emergencyWithdraw function; owner drained all pools; code complexity hid the backdoor
signatures.fix: Full audit including owner privileges; verify no hidden admin functions; timelock on all admin operations; renounce ownership

signatures.name: StableMagnet Fee Extraction Rug
signatures.root_cause: DEX contract referenced external library for swap calculations; library contained hidden function allowing owner to set arbitrary swap output; owner extracted user funds through manipulated swaps
signatures.fix: Verify all external library source code; inline critical swap logic; library address immutability; audit delegatecall targets

signatures.name: Merlin DEX Arbitrum LP Rug
signatures.root_cause: Despite CertiK audit, contract retained owner ability to drain LP; deployer removed all liquidity immediately after token sale; audit missed privileged function
signatures.fix: Verify audit covers owner privileges; check if LP locked; time-lock LP removal; require multi-sig for liquidity operations

signatures.name: Magnate Finance Base Chain Rug
signatures.root_cause: Compound fork with admin-controlled oracle; deployer set collateral price to extreme value; borrowed all deposited assets against inflated collateral; same team suspected in previous rugs
signatures.fix: Decentralized oracle only; no admin price override; verify team identity; check deployer history on-chain

signatures.name: BEC Token BatchTransfer Overflow
signatures.root_cause: uint256 multiplication overflow in batchTransfer: _value * receivers.length overflowed to small number; sender balance check passed; massive tokens minted to receivers
signatures.fix: Use SafeMath library; upgrade to Solidity 0.8+; add explicit overflow checks; validate total transfer amount

signatures.name: SMT Token ProxyTransfer Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Similar to BEC; fee + value calculation overflowed; sender appeared to have sufficient balance; excess tokens transferred
signatures.fix: Use SafeMath for all arithmetic; validate fee + value does not overflow; Solidity 0.8+ auto-checks

signatures.name: PoWHC Ponzi Underflow Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Unsigned integer underflow when selling tokens; balance subtraction wrapped around to max uint256; seller received far more ETH than deposited
signatures.fix: SafeMath require for subtraction; check balance >= amount before subtract; Solidity 0.8+ auto-revert

signatures.name: USDT Pausable Transfer Bypass via Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Integer overflow in allowance check could bypass paused state; overflow made allowance appear sufficient even when contract was paused; disclosed responsibly
signatures.fix: SafeMath on all allowance checks; separate pause check from transfer logic; audit all auth bypass paths

signatures.name: Poolz Finance Integer Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Inline assembly used unchecked arithmetic for pool creation; array length multiplication overflowed; attacker created pool with manipulated parameters extracting locked tokens
signatures.fix: Avoid inline assembly for arithmetic; use checked math even in assembly; validate array bounds; Solidity 0.8+ for all paths

signatures.name: SushiSwap MISO Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Dutch auction batch commit function had unchecked addition in older Solidity; supply chain attack via malicious contractor added overflow-exploiting code; insider threat
signatures.fix: Code review for all contributors; verified reproducible builds; SafeMath enforcement; separation of concerns for critical functions

signatures.name: Punk Protocol First Deposit Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Compound fork yield protocol; first deposit share calculation had integer division truncation; attacker donated tokens to inflate exchange rate then exploited rounding
signatures.fix: Mint dead shares on first deposit; enforce minimum initial deposit; use virtual offset in share calculation

signatures.name: Pancake Bunny Flash Loan BSC
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated PancakeSwap BUNNY-BNB LP price; reward calculation used spot LP value; massive BUNNY minted and sold
signatures.fix: Use time-weighted LP pricing for rewards; cap reward per epoch; add flash loan detection

signatures.name: AutoShark Finance BSC Fork
signatures.root_cause: PancakeBunny fork; same vulnerability—flash loan inflated LP price; reward calculation not patched from original codebase
signatures.fix: Audit forked code independently; do not assume upstream fixes applied; test all reward paths against flash loan

signatures.name: Merlin Labs BSC Flash Loan
signatures.root_cause: Another PancakeBunny fork with same reward inflation bug; flash loan boosted vault TVL temporarily; rewards calculated on inflated TVL
signatures.fix: Time-weighted TVL for reward calculation; minimum deposit duration; flash loan guard on reward functions

signatures.name: bEarn Fi Strategy Imbalance
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan deposited into vault; strategy allocation created imbalance between pools; withdraw exploited price difference between strategy pools
signatures.fix: Snapshot strategy balances; atomic rebalancing; prevent same-block deposit-withdraw; strategy balance invariant check

signatures.name: xToken Market Manipulation
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated Kyber and Bancor prices; xSNX/xBNT minted at manipulated exchange rate; tokens sold for true market value
signatures.fix: Use Chainlink oracle for mint pricing; add price deviation check across DEXes; cap single-block mints

signatures.name: Rari Capital Pool 26 Flash Loan
signatures.root_cause: ETH pool accepted SushiSwap LP tokens as collateral; flash loan manipulated SushiSwap pool reserves; inflated LP token price used as collateral to borrow
signatures.fix: Reject manipulable LP tokens as collateral; use fair LP pricing; collateral factor caps for LP tokens

signatures.name: ElevenFinance Nerve Pool Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan deposited into Nerve stable pool; emergencyBurn function had no flash loan guard; burned LP tokens received disproportionate underlying
signatures.fix: Add flash loan guard to all emergency functions; validate withdrawal proportions; minimum deposit lock period

signatures.name: Cream Finance v2 IronBank Flash Loan
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan inflated yUSD vault price via Curve manipulation; used as collateral in IronBank; borrowed all available assets against inflated collateral
signatures.fix: Cap collateral factors for yield-bearing tokens; independent oracle for vault tokens; borrow rate circuit breaker

signatures.name: Beanstalk Flash Loan Price Manipulation
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan acquired massive governance tokens via Curve pool; used flash-loaned tokens to pass and execute malicious proposal in single transaction
signatures.fix: Exclude flash-loaned tokens from governance; snapshot-based voting; timelock on emergency proposals

signatures.name: Bogged Finance BSC Flash Loan
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated BOG token staking rewards; staking reward calculated from spot token price; flash loan inflated price then claimed excess rewards
signatures.fix: TWAP for reward calculation; minimum stake duration; flash loan detection on reward claims

signatures.name: Visor Finance Hypervisor Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan exploited Uniswap V3 LP token pricing in Hypervisor vault; deposit function calculated shares from manipulable spot tick price
signatures.fix: Use TWAP tick for LP valuation; validate tick range on deposit; cap single-block deposit size

signatures.name: KyberSwap Elastic Tick Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan pushed price to extreme tick boundary; tick crossing calculation had precision error; attacker extracted value from rounding at tick boundary via repeated cross-tick swaps
signatures.fix: Bounds checking at tick boundaries; higher precision intermediary calculations; fuzz test extreme tick values

signatures.name: Nexus Mutual CEO Key Phishing
signatures.root_cause: Attacker installed trojanized MetaMask extension on CEO device; transaction signing showed legitimate transfer but actually approved token drain
signatures.fix: Verify transaction data on hardware wallet screen; use dedicated signing device; multi-sig for large transfers

signatures.name: Vulcan Forged Private Key Extraction
signatures.root_cause: Gaming platform stored user private keys on centralized server; server compromised; attacker extracted 96 wallet keys and drained funds
signatures.fix: Non-custodial wallet design; encrypt keys with user-only passphrase; hardware security modules; zero-knowledge key management

signatures.name: Transit Swap Aggregator Approval Drain
signatures.root_cause: Swap contract had external call function that could be called with arbitrary data; attacker used it to call transferFrom on user-approved tokens
signatures.fix: Whitelist callable functions; remove arbitrary call capability; validate call targets

signatures.name: MonoX Protocol Access Control Gap
signatures.root_cause: Swap function allowed using MONO as both tokenIn and tokenOut without validation; no access control on price update path; attacker self-inflated MONO price
signatures.fix: Validate tokenIn != tokenOut; restrict price update mechanism; add swap invariant checks

signatures.name: Furucombo Proxy Delegation Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Aave V2 upgrade left initialization state allowing re-initialization; Furucombo proxy delegated calls to Aave; attacker re-initialized Aave handler to redirect to malicious contract
signatures.fix: Verify handler initialization state; whitelist delegation targets; immutable handler registry

signatures.name: Treasure DAO NFT Free Mint
signatures.root_cause: NFT marketplace buyItem function accepted quantity 0 which bypassed payment check but still transferred NFTs; attacker bought 100+ NFTs for free
signatures.fix: Require quantity > 0; validate payment matches quantity * price; add re-entrancy guard

signatures.name: Multichain anySwapV4Router Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Router function used permit() for token approval; for WETH which lacks permit, function still proceeded; attacker could drain WETH from users who had approved router
signatures.fix: Check token supports EIP-2612 before calling permit; validate permit success; separate paths for permit and non-permit tokens

signatures.name: BonqDAO Oracle + Liquidation Access
signatures.root_cause: Anyone could submit oracle price update with minimal TRB stake; attacker submitted extreme price then liquidated positions at false valuations
signatures.fix: Require higher oracle stake; multi-source price aggregation; liquidation delay after price update; price change rate limit

signatures.name: Yearn Finance yDAI Misconfiguration
signatures.root_cause: Strategy withdrawal was accessible by any caller; attacker triggered withdrawal at manipulated prices; strategy did not verify caller authorization
signatures.fix: Restrict strategy management to authorized keepers; add caller validation; minimum time between earn() calls

signatures.name: SushiSwap MISO LaunchPad Access
signatures.root_cause: Supply chain attack; contractor inserted backdoor in auction contract; initMarket could be called by contractor address to redirect auction funds
signatures.fix: Multi-party code review; reproducible builds; restrict deployment to verified team; audit all contributor changes

signatures.name: Ankr aBNBc Infinite Mint
signatures.root_cause: Deployer private key compromised; attacker used deployer key to call privileged mint function; minted 20T aBNBc tokens and sold on DEX
signatures.fix: Multi-sig for mint function; rate-limit minting; monitor deployer key activity; timelock on privileged operations

signatures.name: Compound TUSD Integration Bug
signatures.root_cause: TUSD token upgrade changed decimals behavior; Compound v2 market did not account for token upgrade; interest accrual miscalculated after token change
signatures.fix: Monitor integrated token contracts for upgrades; validate token behavior post-upgrade; add token change detection

signatures.name: Deus Finance DEI Stablecoin Depeg
signatures.root_cause: Public burn function allowed anyone to burn DEI tokens from approved addresses; approval mechanism too permissive; attacker burned pool reserves causing depeg
signatures.fix: Restrict burn to token holder only; remove third-party burn capability; validate burn authorization

signatures.name: Conic Finance Rounding Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Rounding direction in withdrawal calculation favored withdrawer; repeated small deposits and withdrawals extracted dust amounts that compounded
signatures.fix: Round against withdrawer (round down on withdraw); minimum withdrawal amount; validate total extracted vs deposited

signatures.name: LendHub BSC Market Deprecation Bug
signatures.root_cause: Deprecated IBSV market kept active; market had no liquidity but collateral factor still set; attacker deposited deprecated token as collateral and borrowed real assets
signatures.fix: Set collateral factor to 0 when deprecating markets; remove deprecated tokens from collateral list; automated market sunsetting

signatures.name: Balancer V2 Boosted Pool Rate Provider
signatures.root_cause: Boosted pool rate provider returned stale rate during reentrancy; external composability allowed other protocols to read incorrect rate
signatures.fix: Reentrancy-aware rate providers; validate rate freshness; disable rate reads during state transitions

signatures.name: Hope Finance Reward Calculation Bug
signatures.root_cause: Reward per share calculation used total supply instead of staked supply; when tokens burned, remaining stakers received disproportionate rewards
signatures.fix: Use staked supply for reward calculations; adjust reward rate on burn; snapshot-based reward accounting

signatures.name: Jimbo Protocol Rebalancing Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Liquidity rebalancing mechanism moved concentrated liquidity to wrong price range; attacker front-ran rebalance to extract value from mispriced liquidity
signatures.fix: Private mempool for rebalancing; validate target price range; atomic rebalance with price checks

signatures.name: Sentiment Protocol Health Factor Bypass
signatures.root_cause: Health factor check used different price path than liquidation; Balancer pool reentrancy created temporary price discrepancy; borrowed during price inconsistency window
signatures.fix: Unified price source for health factor and liquidation; reentrancy guard across all price reads; atomic health factor validation

signatures.name: Tornado Cash Relayer Fee Miscalculation
signatures.root_cause: Relayer fee calculation in updated contract had decimal precision error; certain withdrawal amounts resulted in negative fee wrap-around; relayer received excess ETH
signatures.fix: SafeMath for fee calculations; validate fee < withdrawal amount; cap relayer fee percentage

signatures.name: Exactly Protocol Permit Logic Error
signatures.root_cause: Leverage function used permit for approval but did not validate permit target; attacker crafted permit to approve market contract; market contract held user funds
signatures.fix: Validate permit target matches expected contract; restrict leverage callers; add permit nonce verification

signatures.name: Harvest Finance Curve y Pool Oracle
signatures.root_cause: Vault used Curve y pool spot reserves as price oracle; flash loan swapped $50M USDC→USDT shifting reserves; vault share price based on manipulated reserves
signatures.fix: Use Curve virtual_price with sanity bounds; add TWAP; price deviation circuit breaker

signatures.name: Warp Finance Uniswap LP Oracle
signatures.root_cause: Lending protocol used Uniswap LP token reserve ratio as oracle; flash loan skewed reserves; LP token collateral overvalued by 10x+
signatures.fix: Alpha Finance fair LP pricing formula: price = 2 * sqrt(r0*r1) * sqrt(p0*p1) / totalSupply; external oracle for LP pricing

signatures.name: Beanstalk Oracle Manipulation via Curve
signatures.root_cause: Bean price oracle relied on instantaneous Curve pool deltaB; flash loan manipulated Curve pool to show BEAN above peg; triggered excessive minting via seigniorage mechanism
signatures.fix: Cumulative time-weighted deltaB; multi-pool oracle aggregation; maximum minting rate per epoch

signatures.name: CRV Oracle Attack on Aave v2
signatures.root_cause: Attacker built massive CRV collateral position on Aave v2; borrowed against thin liquidity asset; attempted to crash CRV price externally to create bad debt
signatures.fix: Dynamic collateral caps based on on-chain liquidity; isolated lending markets for low-liquidity assets; faster oracle updates

signatures.name: UVT Token Price Oracle on PancakeSwap
signatures.root_cause: Protocol used PancakeSwap pair as sole price oracle; flash loan manipulated pair reserves; staking rewards calculated at inflated price
signatures.fix: Multi-source oracle aggregation; TWAP over multiple blocks; Chainlink as primary; DEX as backup only

signatures.name: Zunami Protocol Curve Manipulation
signatures.root_cause: Zunami strategy used Curve pool spot price for deposit calculation; flash loan manipulated Curve pool; deposited at favorable rate then withdrew at true rate
signatures.fix: Use Curve EMA oracle; validate deposit price within bounds; minimum deposit lock period

signatures.name: Dodo V2 Pool Oracle Bypass
signatures.root_cause: DODO V2 pool init function could be called to reset oracle state; flash loan combined with re-initialization set oracle to attacker-favorable price
signatures.fix: Prevent pool re-initialization; immutable oracle base state; add initialization guard; validate oracle after state changes

signatures.name: EraLend Read-Only Oracle Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Lending protocol read SyncSwap pool oracle during reentrancy window; view function returned stale reserves; loans issued at incorrect collateral valuation
signatures.fix: Use reentrancy-aware oracle; validate price freshness; circuit breaker on price deviation from external reference

signatures.name: Rodeo Finance Oracle Timestamp Bypass
signatures.root_cause: Oracle freshness check used block.timestamp with too generous staleness window; attacker used stale oracle price combined with TWAP manipulation to inflate collateral value
signatures.fix: Tighten oracle staleness window; multi-oracle validation; price change rate limiting; fallback oracle on staleness

signatures.name: Euler Finance Deployer Key Compromise
signatures.root_cause: While primarily a logic exploit, attacker used privileged contract interactions that required knowledge of internal deployment structure; exploited specific contract relationships
signatures.fix: Minimize privileged roles; transparent deployment; multi-sig for all critical operations; formal verification of contract interactions

signatures.name: Alphapo Payment Processor Hack
signatures.root_cause: Payment processor hot wallet private keys compromised; attributed to Lazarus Group; systematic drain of crypto payment processor across multiple chains
signatures.fix: Cold storage for majority reserves; MPC signing; automated withdrawal limits; behavior-based anomaly detection

signatures.name: Poloniex Exchange Hot Wallet
signatures.root_cause: Exchange hot wallet private keys compromised; suspected state-sponsored attack; $130M drained across Ethereum, TRON, and Bitcoin chains within hours
signatures.fix: Hardware security modules; multi-party key management; automated balance monitoring; withdrawal circuit breakers

signatures.name: Mixin Network Cloud Key Breach
signatures.root_cause: Cloud service provider database for Mixin Network compromised; private keys stored in cloud infrastructure breached; attacker accessed mainnet asset keys
signatures.fix: Self-hosted key infrastructure; HSM-based key management; encrypt keys at rest with separate custody; zero-trust architecture

signatures.name: dBridge Validator Key Theft Attempt
signatures.root_cause: Phishing attack targeted deBridge validators via malicious PDF email; if opened, malware would extract validator keys; attack detected and prevented by team
signatures.fix: Security awareness training; sandboxed document viewing; network isolation for validator nodes; monitoring for unusual key access

signatures.name: Coins.ph Exchange Key Breach
signatures.root_cause: Philippine crypto exchange hot wallet compromised; private keys accessed by unauthorized party; systematic withdrawal across multiple assets
signatures.fix: Multi-sig hot wallets; daily balance audits; withdrawal anomaly detection; insurance coverage

signatures.name: Orbit Chain Multisig Compromise
signatures.root_cause: 7 of 10 multisig signer keys compromised; attacker signed fraudulent bridge withdrawals; keys potentially obtained via social engineering or infrastructure compromise
signatures.fix: Hardware key storage per signer; geographic distribution; threshold increase; time-delayed large withdrawals

signatures.name: WazirX Exchange Key Compromise
signatures.root_cause: Indian exchange Gnosis Safe multisig compromised; attacker manipulated multisig signing UI to show different transaction than what was actually signed; $235M drained
signatures.fix: Verify transaction data on hardware wallet; independent transaction verification; multi-channel confirmation for large transfers

signatures.name: Nomad Bridge Message Verification Bypass
signatures.root_cause: Upgrade initialized trusted root to 0x00; any message with zero proof passed verification; hundreds of copycat attackers drained remaining funds after first exploit was seen
signatures.fix: Never initialize trusted root to zero; require non-zero proof; upgrade testing with verification checks; staged rollout

signatures.name: Poly Network Second Bridge Attack
signatures.root_cause: Bridge relayer keys compromised; attacker forged cross-chain messages by using compromised relayer to validate fake headers; second attack on same protocol
signatures.fix: Decentralize relayer set; multi-relayer confirmation; header validation against light client; remove single-relayer trust assumption

signatures.name: Multichain/anySwap Bridge Drain
signatures.root_cause: MPC bridge keys centrally held by CEO; when CEO detained, keys either compromised or used by third party; bridge assets drained across Ethereum, Fantom, Moonriver
signatures.fix: True MPC with independent parties; no single party holds >1 share; dead-man switch with key rotation; on-chain proof of custody

signatures.name: Celer cBridge SGN Vulnerability
signatures.root_cause: Bridge frontend DNS hijacked via BGP attack; users redirected to malicious contract that drained approved tokens; bridge contract itself not compromised
signatures.fix: DNSSEC; certificate pinning; on-chain contract address verification; multi-channel frontend validation

signatures.name: Allbridge Core Pool Drain
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated bridge pool balance; swap oracle used pool balance as price reference; attacker swapped at manipulated rate then withdrew real assets
signatures.fix: External oracle for swap pricing; flash loan guard on bridge pools; pool balance sanity checks

signatures.name: Rubic Exchange Proxy Approval Drain
signatures.root_cause: Cross-chain aggregator router had unrestricted calldata execution; attacker used it to call transferFrom on tokens users had approved to router
signatures.fix: Whitelist callable targets and function selectors; validate calldata; revoke excessive approvals

signatures.name: Axelar Gateway Misconfiguration
signatures.root_cause: Critical vulnerability in Axelar gateway contract: insufficient validation of interchain token service (ITS) messages could allow unauthorized token minting; disclosed by security researcher
signatures.fix: Additional message validation layers; interchain message authentication; rate limiting on minting; bug bounty program

signatures.name: Across Protocol V2 Fill Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Relay fill function did not properly validate fill amounts against original deposit; partial fills could be submitted multiple times to drain more than deposited
signatures.fix: Track cumulative fill amounts per deposit; validate fill <= remaining; atomic fill-and-settle

signatures.name: Beanstalk Emergency Governance Abuse
signatures.root_cause: Emergency governance mechanism had no timelock; combined with flash loan token acquisition; malicious BIP proposed and executed within single block
signatures.fix: Timelock on ALL governance paths including emergency; no governance action in same block as token acquisition; snapshot voting

signatures.name: Rari Capital Tribe DAO Governance Deadlock
signatures.root_cause: After Fei/Rari hack, governance deadlocked on how to distribute remaining funds; Tribe DAO vote to reimburse or not caused community split; funds locked in governance limbo
signatures.fix: Pre-defined loss distribution rules; governance-independent insurance fund; clear dissolution procedures in bylaws

signatures.name: PAID Network Infinite Mint via Governance
signatures.root_cause: Project deployer key compromised; used to call mint function (governance-controlled) to create 60M new PAID tokens; dumped on Uniswap
signatures.fix: Multi-sig for mint function; governance timelock; minting cap per transaction; community notification before large mints

signatures.name: Indexed Finance Weight Manipulation Vote
signatures.root_cause: Index fund weight adjustment was permissionless via controller; attacker manipulated token weights to extreme values via governance loophole; drained underweighted tokens
signatures.fix: Restrict weight adjustment to governance multisig; add weight change limits per epoch; require time delay between weight changes

signatures.name: Mochi USDM Curve Governance Attack
signatures.root_cause: Protocol minted MOCHI tokens to vote on Curve gauge; directed CRV emissions to USDM pool; used inflated liquidity to borrow against USDM; effectively extracted value from Curve ecosystem
signatures.fix: Curve DAO blacklist; gauge weight caps for new pools; time-weighted gauge voting; cross-protocol governance monitoring

signatures.name: Wonderland TIME Treasury Mismanagement
signatures.root_cause: Treasury manager revealed to be convicted fraudster; treasury managed without transparent governance; community lost confidence; bank run triggered massive depeg
signatures.fix: Transparent treasury management; on-chain treasury tracking; regular audits; KYC for key holders; community oversight

signatures.name: Fortress Protocol Governance Oracle Change
signatures.root_cause: Attacker gained governance control; passed proposal to change price oracle to attacker-controlled contract; oracle reported inflated FTS price; borrowed all pool assets
signatures.fix: Oracle cannot be changed via governance alone; multi-party oracle management; oracle change requires timelock + community approval

signatures.name: Aragon DAO Treasury Dispute
signatures.root_cause: Activist investors accumulated ANT tokens; threatened governance attack to force treasury distribution; Aragon Association dissolved DAO and transferred funds to new entity
signatures.fix: Clear governance constitution; anti-raider provisions; progressive decentralization; well-defined dissolution procedures

signatures.name: Thodex Exchange Exit Scam
signatures.root_cause: Turkish exchange CEO fled country with user funds; exchange suspended withdrawals citing 'partnership negotiations'; CEO later arrested in Albania; $2B user funds unrecovered
signatures.fix: Proof of reserves; regulatory compliance; segregated user funds; multi-jurisdiction legal framework

signatures.name: OneCoin Ponzi Rug
signatures.root_cause: Massive Ponzi scheme disguised as cryptocurrency; no actual blockchain existed; fake exchange showed fabricated trading; founder disappeared with $4B+
signatures.fix: Verify blockchain exists on explorer; check token contract on-chain; independent audit of claims; regulatory due diligence

signatures.name: FineCrypto BSC Rug Pull
signatures.root_cause: Token contract had hidden mint function; owner minted tokens exceeding initial supply; massive sell pressure crashed price; owner extracted all BNB liquidity
signatures.fix: Verify no owner mint capability; fixed supply verified on-chain; renounced ownership; LP locked

signatures.name: Frosties NFT Rug Pull
signatures.root_cause: NFT project sold 8,888 tokens at 0.04 ETH each; team deleted social media, website, and Discord within hours of sellout; funds transferred to exchange for off-ramping; DOJ prosecution
signatures.fix: Verify team identity; smart contract escrow for mint proceeds; milestone-based fund release; community oversight

signatures.name: Kokomo Finance Optimism Rug
signatures.root_cause: Lending protocol on Optimism; team upgraded proxy to malicious implementation; drained all deposited assets; deleted all social media and disappeared
signatures.fix: Non-upgradeable contracts or timelocked upgrades; verify team doxxed; third-party contract ownership

signatures.name: DeFi100 BSC Exit Scam
signatures.root_cause: BSC yield farming project; team gradually removed liquidity over several days; website eventually displayed 'We scammed you' message before going offline
signatures.fix: Monitor LP token movements; alert on gradual liquidity decrease; time-locked LP with transparent schedule

signatures.name: Luna Yield Solana Rug
signatures.root_cause: Solana yield aggregator; vault contracts had admin-only withdrawAll function; admin drained all vaults and bridged funds to Ethereum via Wormhole; first major Solana rug
signatures.fix: Remove admin withdrawal; multi-sig admin; timelock on admin functions; on-chain withdrawal monitoring

signatures.name: HospoWise Token Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Token transfer function lacked SafeMath; sender balance check used unchecked subtraction; underflow allowed transfer of more tokens than held
signatures.fix: SafeMath for all arithmetic; explicit require(balance >= amount); Solidity 0.8+ default checks

signatures.name: Token MESH Approval Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Approval amount overflow; uint256 overflow in allowance check allowed unlimited transfer even with small approval; combined with transferFrom to drain tokens
signatures.fix: SafeMath on approval checks; use increaseAllowance/decreaseAllowance pattern; cap approval amounts

signatures.name: ICON Token Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Integer overflow in token transfer balance calculation; discovered during audit; would have allowed minting unlimited tokens via overflow; patched before exploitation
signatures.fix: SafeMath implementation; comprehensive audit; automated overflow testing; Solidity 0.8+ migration

signatures.name: Hexagon Token Batch Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Same batchOverflow pattern as BEC token; multiplying value by recipient count overflowed; sender balance check passed with small actual balance
signatures.fix: SafeMath; check each recipient individually; cap batch size; Solidity 0.8+

signatures.name: Multi-Token Batch Overflow Wave
signatures.root_cause: After BEC and SMT overflow disclosures, researchers found 40+ tokens with identical batchOverflow vulnerability; exchanges paused all ERC-20 deposits temporarily
signatures.fix: Automated contract scanning for known overflow patterns; exchange integration testing; SafeMath enforcement standard

signatures.name: YAM Finance Rebase Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Rebase function had unchecked multiplication; totalSupply times rebase factor overflowed; governance treasury received far more tokens than intended; protocol rendered ungovernable
signatures.fix: Checked math for all rebase operations; simulate rebase on fork; cap rebase percentage per epoch; emergency pause

signatures.name: Uranium Finance Pair Overflow
signatures.root_cause: V2 to V2.1 migration changed balance check constant from 1000 to 10000 but swap function still used 1000; 100x mismatch allowed extracting more than deposited
signatures.fix: Verify all constant references updated during migration; automated invariant testing; formal verification of AMM math

signatures.name: Rari Capital Fuse Pool 27 Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Reentrancy via ETH transfer callback in CEther; exitMarket called during borrow removed collateral requirement; Compound fork without adequate reentrancy protection
signatures.fix: Global reentrancy lock across all Comptroller functions; check-effects-interactions; non-reentrant modifier on all external functions

signatures.name: Reentrancy via ERC-1155 safeTransferFrom
signatures.root_cause: ERC-1155 standard requires onERC1155Received callback; multiple NFT marketplaces did not guard against reentrancy during safe transfer; attacker re-entered buy function
signatures.fix: Reentrancy guard on all marketplace functions; update state before safe transfer; validate balance after callback

signatures.name: Cream Finance v1 Flash Loan Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan callback allowed re-entering lending pool; multiple borrow positions opened during callback; total borrowed exceeded collateral
signatures.fix: Flash loan reentrancy guard; check total borrowed after callback; unified lock across flash and borrow

signatures.name: Aave V1 Flash Loan Reentrancy Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Early Aave V1 flash loan implementation; callback could re-enter deposit function; flash-loaned funds deposited as collateral; borrowed against deposited flash loan funds
signatures.fix: Reentrancy guard spanning flash loan lifecycle; prevent deposit during flash; validate net position after flash

signatures.name: Omni Protocol NFT Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: NFT lending protocol; onERC721Received callback during collateral transfer; re-entered borrow to take multiple loans against same NFT collateral
signatures.fix: Reentrancy guard; update collateral state before transfer; validate unique collateral per loan

signatures.name: Paraluni AMM Reentrancy BSC
signatures.root_cause: AMM did not guard against reentrancy on add/remove liquidity; token with transfer callback re-entered remove liquidity during add; LP tokens minted for non-existent liquidity
signatures.fix: Reentrancy guard on all liquidity functions; verify actual token balance change; use lock pattern for all AMM operations

signatures.name: Bacon Protocol Mortgage NFT Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Real estate-backed protocol; withdrawal function transferred funds before updating share balance; attacker re-entered withdrawal multiple times draining pool
signatures.fix: Check-effects-interactions pattern; update balance before transfer; reentrancy guard modifier

signatures.name: Sturdy Finance Balancer Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Read-only reentrancy on Balancer pool; during flash loan callback, Balancer pool reported stale LP token price; Sturdy used this as oracle; borrowed against inflated collateral
signatures.fix: Reentrancy-aware Balancer oracle; validate LP price against independent source; add oracle freshness check

signatures.name: Earning.Farm ERC-777 Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Vault accepted ERC-777 token; tokensReceived hook during deposit re-entered vault; multiple deposit credits for single token transfer
signatures.fix: Reentrancy guard on all vault functions; check actual balance change after deposit; reject ERC-777 tokens or handle hooks

signatures.name: dYdX Flash Loan Reentrancy Early Pattern
signatures.root_cause: dYdX flash loan used in bZx attack chain; flash loan callback enabled reentrancy into Compound and bZx in sequence; complex multi-protocol reentrancy path
signatures.fix: Cross-protocol reentrancy awareness; limit composability entry points; unified reentrancy lock concept

signatures.name: Pancake Hunny BSC Fork
signatures.root_cause: PancakeBunny fork inherited flash loan reward vulnerability; reward calculated from spot LP value
signatures.fix: Audit all forked reward logic; TWAP for rewards

signatures.name: BurgerSwap BSC Flash Loan
signatures.root_cause: BurgerSwap allowed reentrancy during swap; flash loan re-entered swap to manipulate reserves mid-transaction
signatures.fix: Reentrancy guard on swap; validate reserves after each swap

signatures.name: PolyYeld Finance Flash Loan
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan inflated vault deposits; share price calculation used spot balance; attacker extracted excess shares
signatures.fix: Snapshot balance for share calculation; minimum deposit lock

signatures.name: Saddle Finance Metapool Flash Loan
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan exploited metapool LP price miscalculation; decimal inconsistency between base and meta pool
signatures.fix: Normalize decimals; formal verification of metapool math

signatures.name: Deus Finance USDC Flash Loan
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated DEI price on SpiritSwap; lending protocol used DEI spot price; borrowed at inflated collateral value
signatures.fix: Chainlink oracle; TWAP price feed; collateral cap

signatures.name: New Free DAO BSC Flash Loan
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan inflated staking rewards; reward distribution used instantaneous balance; attacker claimed disproportionate rewards
signatures.fix: Time-weighted staking for rewards; minimum stake duration

signatures.name: Dexible DEX Aggregator Drain
signatures.root_cause: Aggregator routing contract had unlimited approval; flash loan combined with routing to drain approved tokens via crafted swap path
signatures.fix: Limit approvals; validate swap output; whitelist routes

signatures.name: Defrost Finance Avalanche Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Fake collateral token added by admin; flash loan used to inflate fake token price; liquidated real positions against inflated fake collateral
signatures.fix: Decentralized collateral listing; no admin token addition; collateral audit

signatures.name: Raydium AMM Flash Loan Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Pool authority account compromised; attacker used flash loan to extract concentrated liquidity pool reserves via manipulated swap parameters
signatures.fix: Multi-sig pool authority; validate swap parameters server-side; rate limiting

signatures.name: Platypus Finance V2 Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Second attack; flash loan deposited into pool then swapped at favorable rate; pool rebalancing formula had rounding error favoring large depositors
signatures.fix: Invariant checking post-swap; anti-whale deposit caps; formal verification of pool math

signatures.name: Nirvana Finance ANA Token Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated ANA virtual price; minted ANA at low price using manipulated reserves; sold at true price for profit
signatures.fix: TWAP virtual price; flash loan guard on minting; price bounds validation

signatures.name: Transit Finance BSC Second Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Updated aggregator contract still had vulnerability; flash loan combined with routing manipulation to extract value from routing contract
signatures.fix: Complete audit of fix; independent security review; formal verification of routing logic

signatures.name: Uranium Finance Admin Key Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Admin key compromised; attacker set fee recipient to own address and increased fee to 100%; all swaps directed fees to attacker
signatures.fix: Multi-sig admin; fee change timelock; cap maximum fee

signatures.name: Multichain Fantom Unauthorized Mint
signatures.root_cause: Bridge minting function had insufficient verification of cross-chain message source; attacker crafted message that passed verification but referenced non-existent deposit
signatures.fix: Verify deposit on source chain before minting; multi-validator confirmation; rate limiting

signatures.name: Safemoon BSC Upgrade Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Contract upgrade introduced public burn function; attacker burned LP tokens from liquidity pool directly; reduced pool liquidity; price manipulation followed
signatures.fix: Access control on all token operations; audit upgrades thoroughly; LP token burn protection

signatures.name: OlympusDAO Bond Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Bond redemption function lacked proper access control; anyone could redeem another user's matured bonds to their own address
signatures.fix: Verify msg.sender matches bond owner; add beneficiary validation

signatures.name: Team Finance Uniswap V3 Migration
signatures.root_cause: V2 to V3 migration function allowed user-controlled sqrtPriceX96 parameter; attacker set extreme initial price; migration created pool at attacker-favorable rate
signatures.fix: Fix migration price from current market; validate sqrtPriceX96 bounds; use existing pool price if available

signatures.name: SushiSwap RouteProcessor2 Approval
signatures.root_cause: RouteProcessor2 contract had approve() bug; any pool address could be passed as route; attacker used it to drain tokens from users who approved the router
signatures.fix: Validate route addresses; whitelist pools; revoke approvals advisory

signatures.name: Euler Finance Peripheral Contract Access
signatures.root_cause: donateToReserves had no access control; allowed any caller to inflate debt tokens without backing; attacker created undercollateralized positions via donation
signatures.fix: Access control on donation; validate health factor after any balance change; restrict debt-creating operations

signatures.name: Ledger Connect Kit Supply Chain
signatures.root_cause: Former Ledger employee phished; npm package ledger-connect-kit backdoored; malicious code injected drain transactions into any dApp using the library
signatures.fix: Package signing; subresource integrity; lock npm dependencies; employee access revocation procedures

signatures.name: KuCoin Exchange Hot Wallet Hack
signatures.root_cause: Exchange hot wallet private keys leaked; systematic drain of ETH, ERC-20 tokens, and BTC; attributed to Lazarus Group; most funds recovered via token freezes and project cooperation
signatures.fix: HSM key storage; MPC signing; automated withdrawal limits; industry cooperation framework

signatures.name: EigenLayer Renzo restETH Access Bug
signatures.root_cause: Restaking protocol withdrawal function had race condition between unstaking and withdrawal; attacker could claim withdrawal before unstaking settlement completed
signatures.fix: Atomic unstake-and-withdraw; settlement period enforcement; withdrawal queue

signatures.name: DeFiPie BSC Access Control
signatures.root_cause: Ownership transfer function had no access modifier; anyone could call changeOwner and take control of protocol; attacker drained treasury
signatures.fix: onlyOwner modifier on all admin functions; 2-step ownership transfer; timelock

signatures.name: Yearn Finance V2 Vault Strategy Bug
signatures.root_cause: Strategy miscalculated available funds; flash loan inflated vault balance; harvest sent excess funds to strategy; strategy loss on unwinding
signatures.fix: Validate strategy capacity; cap single harvest; cross-check available vs expected

signatures.name: Pancake Bunny V2 Reward Bug
