signatures.root_cause: Polygon deployment of Bunny V2 had reward multiplier bug; polygon block time different from BSC; rewards distributed at 5x intended rate
signatures.fix: Chain-specific parameter validation; reward rate caps; cross-chain deployment testing

signatures.name: Popsicle Finance Double Reward
signatures.root_cause: Fee collection did not account for LP token transfers; transferring LP tokens reset fee debt; attacker collected fees, transferred tokens, collected again
signatures.fix: Track fees per LP token position; transfer hooks update fee debt; snapshot-based fee accounting

signatures.name: Thoreum Finance Dividend Logic Bug
signatures.root_cause: Dividend distribution used total balance including contract reserves; dividends calculated on inflated base; early claimers got more than entitled
signatures.fix: Exclude contract reserves from dividend base; use circulating supply; fair distribution formula

signatures.name: Level Finance LVL Claiming Bug
signatures.root_cause: Batch claim function did not properly update claim state between iterations; same epoch could be claimed multiple times in single transaction
signatures.fix: Update state atomically within loop; validate epoch claimed before processing; reentrancy guard on claims

signatures.name: Arcadia Finance Vault Reentrancy Logic
signatures.root_cause: Liquidation health check had logical error; trusted creditors could liquidate even when vault was healthy; combined with flash loan to create temporary unhealthy state
signatures.fix: Independent health verification; separate check from liquidation; minimum health buffer

signatures.name: Steadefi Strategy Rebalance Bug
signatures.root_cause: Leveraged yield vault rebalancing logic had edge case where extreme market movement caused strategy to rebalance into wrong direction; amplified loss instead of reducing
signatures.fix: Validate rebalance direction; circuit breaker on extreme moves; position size limits

signatures.name: Zunami Protocol Strategy Migration Error
signatures.root_cause: Strategy migration left funds in intermediate state; deposit function calculated shares from stale balance; attacker exploited stale state during migration window
signatures.fix: Pause deposits during migration; atomic strategy swap; validate balance consistency

signatures.name: Astrid Finance Avalanche Vault Bug
signatures.root_cause: Strategy withdrawal calculated wrong amount due to accumulated fees not being deducted before share calculation; withdrawers received more than entitled
signatures.fix: Deduct fees before share calculation; validate withdrawal amount; automated invariant testing

signatures.name: Raft Protocol Mint/Burn Precision
signatures.root_cause: Stablecoin mint/burn had precision loss in small amounts; repeated small mint-burn cycles extracted value from rounding; cumulative extraction significant
signatures.fix: Minimum mint/burn amounts; round against caller; validate cumulative precision loss

signatures.name: Manipulated LP Oracle on Visor
signatures.root_cause: Uniswap V3 concentrated liquidity oracle manipulated via flash loan; tick oracle pushed to extreme value; deposit priced at manipulated tick
signatures.fix: TWAP tick oracle; validate tick range; oracle bounds checking

signatures.name: Value DeFi Curve Oracle Attack
signatures.root_cause: Vault used Curve 3pool reserves as oracle; flash loan swapped to skew reserves; vault shares issued at manipulated price
signatures.fix: Use virtual_price; TWAP oracle; maximum deposit per block

signatures.name: Cheese Bank Uniswap Oracle
signatures.root_cause: Lending protocol used Uniswap spot price as sole oracle; flash loan manipulated pair reserves; borrowed at inflated collateral value
signatures.fix: Multi-source oracle; TWAP; Chainlink primary; circuit breaker

signatures.name: Origin Protocol OUSD Oracle Bug
signatures.root_cause: OUSD stablecoin used flash loan to manipulate Uniswap oracle; minted OUSD at inflated exchange rate; redeemed at true rate for profit
signatures.fix: Chainlink oracle for minting; rate deviation check; flash loan guard on mint

signatures.name: Hundred Finance Gnosis Chain Oracle
signatures.root_cause: Compound fork on Gnosis Chain; oracle used local DEX price; flash loan manipulated DEX pair; borrowed against inflated collateral
signatures.fix: Cross-chain oracle; Chainlink on alt chains; oracle freshness validation

signatures.name: Themis Protocol Oracle Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Lending protocol on Arbitrum used Balancer pool as oracle; flash loan manipulated Balancer reserves; borrowed at inflated collateral value during manipulation window
signatures.fix: Chainlink primary oracle; Balancer TWAP only as backup; price deviation circuit breaker

signatures.name: Dodo V1 Oracle State Reset
signatures.root_cause: DODO V1 pool init function could be re-called to reset oracle state; combined with flash loan; oracle reset to attacker-controlled initial value
signatures.fix: One-time initialization; immutable oracle base; initialization guard

signatures.name: Gyroscope Concentrated LP Oracle
signatures.root_cause: Concentrated liquidity pool oracle read from narrow tick range; flash loan pushed price to extreme tick; oracle returned manipulated price for brief window
signatures.fix: Wide tick range for oracle; TWAP across ticks; oracle smoothing; manipulation resistance

signatures.name: Silo Finance Oracle Arbitrage
signatures.root_cause: Lending market used Uniswap V3 TWAP with insufficient observation window; multi-block manipulation over 10 blocks moved TWAP enough for profitable borrow
signatures.fix: Increase observation window; multi-oracle validation; manipulation cost analysis before listing

signatures.name: Crypto.com Exchange Hot Wallet
signatures.root_cause: Exchange 2FA system bypassed; attacker accessed user wallets; unauthorized withdrawals from 483 user accounts; exchange reimbursed all affected users
signatures.fix: Hardware-based 2FA; withdrawal whitelisting; anomaly detection; mandatory cooling period

signatures.name: Slope Wallet Solana Key Leak
signatures.root_cause: Slope mobile wallet logged seed phrases to centralized Sentry server in plaintext; server compromised; 9,231 wallets drained systematically
signatures.fix: Never log seed phrases; local-only key storage; encrypted key management; regular security audits of logging

signatures.name: Liquid Exchange Hot Wallet
signatures.root_cause: Japanese exchange hot wallet MPC keys compromised; attributed to Lazarus Group; systematic drain of BTC, ETH, and 67 ERC-20 tokens
signatures.fix: Cold storage majority; HSM-based MPC; geographic key distribution; automated freeze triggers

signatures.name: Transit Finance Key Management Failure
signatures.root_cause: Aggregator deployer key leaked via insecure CI/CD pipeline; attacker deployed malicious router upgrade; existing user approvals exploited
signatures.fix: Key rotation; CI/CD secrets management; deployment approval process; contract upgrade timelock

signatures.name: Profanity Vanity Address Wave
signatures.root_cause: Profanity vanity address generator used weak PRNG (32-bit seed space); private keys recoverable from public key; multiple protocols affected including Wintermute
signatures.fix: Abandon Profanity; use hardware RNG; migrate all vanity addresses; audit key generation tools

signatures.name: Ascend Exchange Key Leak
signatures.root_cause: BSC exchange deployer private key exposed in public GitHub repository; attacker found key via automated scanning; drained deployer wallet and associated contracts
signatures.fix: Git secret scanning; pre-commit hooks; key rotation; never store keys in code repositories

signatures.name: AscendEX Exchange Hack
signatures.root_cause: Exchange hot wallet keys compromised across Ethereum, BSC, and Polygon; systematic drain of tokens from all three chains; exchange paused operations
signatures.fix: Separate key management per chain; cold storage majority; automated balance monitoring

signatures.name: Kronos Research API Key Theft
signatures.root_cause: Trading firm API keys compromised; unauthorized access to trading accounts; funds transferred to attacker wallets; API keys provided full withdrawal access
signatures.fix: API key permission scoping; IP whitelisting; withdrawal-only keys; mandatory 2FA for API actions

signatures.name: Wormhole Solana VAA Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Deprecated Solana secp256k1 verification program used; attacker forged guardian signature verification; minted 120k wETH on Solana without ETH deposit on Ethereum
signatures.fix: Use current verified programs; validate sysvar against active program; guardian set rotation

signatures.name: Ronin Bridge Validator Exploit
signatures.root_cause: 5 of 9 validator keys compromised via social engineering; Axie DAO validator still authorized from legacy gas-free arrangement; attacker signed fraudulent withdrawals
signatures.fix: Increase validator count and threshold; revoke legacy access; hardware key storage; geographic distribution

signatures.name: BNB Chain Cross-Chain Bridge
signatures.root_cause: Bug in IAVL proof verification for BSC Token Hub; attacker crafted proof that passed verification; minted 2M BNB from bridge; BNB chain halted to limit damage
signatures.fix: Fix IAVL verification; additional proof validation layers; bridge withdrawal limits; emergency halt mechanism

signatures.name: Harmony Horizon 2-of-5 Bridge
signatures.root_cause: Bridge used 2-of-5 multisig; only 2 keys needed to approve withdrawals; attacker compromised 2 keys; signed fraudulent withdrawal transactions
signatures.fix: Increase to 5-of-9+; key rotation schedule; hardware key management; time-delay on large withdrawals

signatures.name: Hector Network Bridge Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Bridge contract had unchecked external call; attacker exploited call to drain bridge liquidity; bridge contract lacked proper validation of cross-chain messages
signatures.fix: Validate all external calls; verify cross-chain message source and format; bridge liquidity limits

signatures.name: Chainswap Bridge Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Bridge signature verification insufficient; attacker could generate valid-looking signatures for arbitrary withdrawal amounts; second attack after earlier $800K exploit
signatures.fix: Robust signature verification; multi-party signing; withdrawal limits; security audit after first exploit

signatures.name: Poly Network Relayer Compromise
signatures.root_cause: Second Poly Network attack; relayer signing keys compromised; attacker forged cross-chain headers; validated fake withdrawal proofs via compromised relayer
signatures.fix: Decentralize relayer set; light client verification; header challenge period; multi-relayer threshold

signatures.name: Socket Gateway V2 Route Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Newly added route passed unvalidated user input to arbitrary call; attacker used it to call transferFrom draining approved tokens; route not properly audited before deployment
signatures.fix: Mandatory audit for all new routes; calldata validation; function selector whitelist; route deployment delay

signatures.name: Tornado Cash Governance Hidden Code
signatures.root_cause: Attacker submitted governance proposal with hidden CREATE2 deployment in constructor; proposal appeared benign but deployed contract giving attacker 10000 TORN votes; gained majority
signatures.fix: Mandatory proposal simulation; code verification period; independent audit of proposal bytecode

signatures.name: Balancer veBAL Governance Concentration
signatures.root_cause: Single entity accumulated large veBAL position; could influence gauge weights to direct emissions; created governance centralization risk; community response prevented exploitation
signatures.fix: Vote delegation limits; gauge weight caps; anti-concentration mechanisms; community monitoring

signatures.name: Beanstalk BIP-23 Governance Exploit
signatures.root_cause: BIP-23 malicious proposal used diamondCut to add new facets draining all Silo deposits; combined with flash loan for instant governance majority; no timelock on emergency path
signatures.fix: Remove emergency execution path; timelock on all governance; diamond upgrade audit; flash loan exclusion from voting

signatures.name: Onyx Protocol Compound Fork Governance
signatures.root_cause: Abandoned Compound fork; attacker accumulated governance tokens cheaply; passed proposal upgrading cToken to malicious implementation; drained all deposits
signatures.fix: Sunset mechanism for inactive protocols; immutable core contracts; governance activity monitoring

signatures.name: Tornado Cash Proposal 21 Recovery
signatures.root_cause: Community counter-proposal to undo attacker's governance takeover; Proposal 21 used same mechanism to restore legitimate governance; attacker had already profited from initial TORN dump
signatures.fix: Pre-defined governance recovery mechanism; emergency guardian with limited power; community rapid response procedures

signatures.name: Atlantis Loans BSC Proxy Upgrade
signatures.root_cause: BSC Compound fork abandoned by team; governance tokens valueless; attacker acquired majority voting power for minimal cost; upgraded proxy to drain all user deposits
signatures.fix: Immutable cToken implementations; migration to non-upgradeable contracts; active governance monitoring

signatures.name: Merit Circle DAO YGG Removal Vote
signatures.root_cause: DAO voted to remove seed investor (YGG) from DAO and return investment at cost basis; governance used to disadvantage minority investor; legal dispute followed
signatures.fix: Investor protections in DAO bylaws; minority rights provisions; legal framework for governance disputes

signatures.name: Ark Finance Governance Token Mint
signatures.root_cause: Governance proposal passed to mint additional tokens to treasury; team controlled treasury; effectively diluted all holders; border between governance action and rug pull
signatures.fix: Cap governance minting power; community veto on dilutive proposals; treasury diversification requirements

signatures.name: Bitconnect Ponzi Exit
signatures.root_cause: Ponzi scheme disguised as lending platform with guaranteed daily returns; platform shut down after multiple cease-and-desist orders; $2.5B user losses; founders charged
signatures.fix: Avoid guaranteed return promises; verify business model sustainability; regulatory compliance checks

signatures.name: SaveTheKids BSC Influencer Rug
signatures.root_cause: Token promoted by YouTube influencers (FaZe clan members); contract had hidden fee modification allowing deployer to set 100% sell tax; insiders sold before fee activated
signatures.fix: Verify contract immutability; check for fee modification functions; beware of influencer-promoted tokens

signatures.name: SnowDog DAO Treasury Drain
signatures.root_cause: OHM fork on Avalanche; team initiated 'buyback' at premium price but insiders front-ran the buyback; treasury drained to insiders; marketed as 'game theory experiment'
signatures.fix: Transparent buyback mechanism; anti-frontrunning; fair launch; no insider advantages

signatures.name: Arbix Finance Arbitrum Rug
signatures.root_cause: Yield aggregator on Arbitrum; contract had unaudited proxy with hidden admin mint; deployer minted 10M tokens and dumped; website and social media deleted
signatures.fix: Mandatory audit; verify proxy admin; check mint functions; monitor deployer activity

signatures.name: Swaprum DEX Arbitrum Rug
signatures.root_cause: DEX on Arbitrum; team removed all liquidity from pools; had been slowly accumulating LP tokens via hidden contract function; social media deleted within hours
signatures.fix: LP locked in audited contract; verify lock duration; community-held LP

signatures.name: Bald Token Base Chain Rug
signatures.root_cause: Memecoin on newly launched Base chain; deployer added and removed liquidity repeatedly; final removal drained most ETH from pool; exploited new chain hype
signatures.fix: Verify LP lock; check deployer wallet history; wait for chain ecosystem maturation

signatures.name: Harvest Keeper AI Trading Rug
signatures.root_cause: AI trading bot scam; promised automated trading returns; collected deposits; admin withdrew all funds; used AI narrative to attract investors; no actual trading algorithm
signatures.fix: Verify trading activity on-chain; check fund segregation; request audit of trading algorithm

signatures.name: USDT Proxy Pause Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Integer overflow in allowance check could bypass paused state; overflow made allowance appear sufficient when contract paused; responsibly disclosed and patched
signatures.fix: SafeMath on allowance; separate pause logic from transfer; audit all auth paths

signatures.name: MonoX Swap Math Error
signatures.root_cause: Price update used same token as input and output; multiplication overflow in price calculation created artificial inflation; not classic overflow but math error with overflow characteristics
signatures.fix: Validate tokenIn != tokenOut; safe math for all price calculations; invariant checks post-swap

signatures.name: Akropolis Pool Reentrancy + Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Combination of reentrancy via dEFI callback and integer overflow in share calculation; deposit credited multiple times; share count exceeded intended maximum
signatures.fix: Reentrancy guard; SafeMath; validate share count against deposit; audit combined attack vectors

signatures.name: PAID Network Mint Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Compromised deployer key called mint with extreme parameter; contract used older Solidity without overflow checks; 60M tokens minted exceeding any reasonable supply
signatures.fix: Mint caps in contract; SafeMath; multi-sig for mint; supply ceiling enforcement

signatures.name: DODO Pool Init Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Pool re-initialization allowed setting base/quote reserves to extreme values; price calculation overflowed; attacker extracted value from overflow-induced mispricing
signatures.fix: Prevent pool re-initialization; validate reserve bounds; SafeMath in price calculations

signatures.name: Superfluid Protocol Calldata Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Bug in calldata parsing led to incorrect ctx decoding; attacker crafted calldata that bypassed authorization check via buffer overflow-like bug; unauthorized token operations
signatures.fix: Strict calldata length validation; typed ABI decoding; fuzz test calldata edge cases

signatures.name: Ola Finance Lending Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Compound fork with deflationary token integration; token transfer fee caused accounting mismatch; borrow amount calculation resulted in integer underflow; borrowed more than collateral
signatures.fix: Handle deflationary tokens explicitly; verify actual received amount; SafeMath on all lending calculations

signatures.name: Flash Loan Vault Share Inflation Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: flash loan deposits inflate vault share denominator; subsequent depositors receive fewer shares; attacker withdraws with excess value
signatures.fix: Virtual shares offset; first-depositor protection; deposit caps per block

signatures.name: Read-Only Reentrancy Oracle Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: view function reads pool state during reentrancy window; stale state returned as oracle price; lending protocol uses stale price for collateral valuation
signatures.fix: Reentrancy-aware view functions; cross-reference oracle sources; price staleness detection

signatures.name: ERC-777 Hook Reentrancy Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: ERC-777 callbacks during token transfer enable reentrancy; any protocol accepting ERC-777 without guards is vulnerable; affects lending, DEX, vaults
signatures.fix: Reentrancy guard; ERC-777 token type detection; update state before token operations

signatures.name: Compound Fork Empty Market Attack Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: first depositor to empty Compound fork market manipulates exchange rate via donation; subsequent depositors receive fewer cTokens; attacker redeems at inflated rate
signatures.fix: Dead shares on first mint; virtual reserves offset; minimum initial deposit

signatures.name: Bridge Message Validation Bypass Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: cross-chain bridge accepts messages without sufficient source chain verification; attacker crafts message that passes local validation but references non-existent source deposit
signatures.fix: Multi-validator message verification; light client proofs; pessimistic verification

signatures.name: Admin Proxy Upgrade Rug Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: upgradeable proxy with single admin; admin deploys malicious implementation; drains all user deposits through upgraded contract; common in DeFi forks
signatures.fix: Multi-sig admin; timelock on upgrade; verified implementation; user opt-out period

signatures.name: LP Token Unlock Rug Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: deployer holds unlocked LP tokens; removes liquidity at peak trading volume; price crashes to zero; common in BSC memecoin launches
signatures.fix: LP lock in audited contract; verify lock duration; team token vesting

signatures.name: Governance Flash Loan Vote Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: flash loan acquires governance tokens; votes and executes malicious proposal in single block; drains treasury or mints tokens; affects any token-weighted governance without snapshot
signatures.fix: Snapshot-based voting; flash loan exclusion; execution timelock; minimum voting period

signatures.name: Oracle Spot Price Lending Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: lending protocol uses DEX spot price as oracle; flash loan manipulates DEX reserves; borrows against inflated collateral; universal across DEX-oracle lending forks
signatures.fix: TWAP oracle; multi-source price aggregation; Chainlink primary; circuit breaker

signatures.name: Integer Overflow in Fee Calculation Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: fee calculation with multiplication before division; large amounts cause overflow wrapping fee to zero or near-zero; transaction proceeds without proper fee deduction
signatures.fix: SafeMath; Solidity 0.8+; divide before multiply where possible; fee amount validation

signatures.name: Platypus Finance AVAX Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan used to manipulate coverage ratio check in stablecoin pool, allowing over-withdrawal
signatures.fix: Add flash loan guard on withdrawal functions and validate coverage ratio post-operation

signatures.name: Balancer V2 Flash Loan Rate Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan callback allowed re-entry into pool pricing logic causing rate distortion
signatures.fix: Implement flash loan callback isolation and post-callback price consistency check

signatures.name: DeFiPie Flash Loan Liquidation
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan funded liquidation exploited stale price feed to liquidate healthy positions
signatures.fix: Require fresh oracle price within same block before liquidation execution

signatures.name: Yearn V2 Vault Flash Manipulation
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan inflated vault share price by donating assets before deposit, diluting other depositors
signatures.fix: Use virtual shares or time-weighted share pricing to prevent single-block manipulation

signatures.name: SushiSwap Kashi Flash Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan used to inflate collateral value within single transaction to borrow excess funds
signatures.fix: Enforce collateral valuation with time delay or multi-block confirmation

signatures.name: WOOFi Swap Price Manipulation
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated sPMM oracle price within WOOFi swap pool causing favorable swap rates
signatures.fix: Add flash loan detection guard and price deviation circuit breaker on swap execution

signatures.name: ParaSpace NFT Flash Loan Attack
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan used to temporarily inflate NFT collateral appraisal via marketplace manipulation
signatures.fix: Use time-weighted average NFT pricing and minimum holding period for collateral

signatures.name: Hundred Finance Optimism Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan exploited empty market rounding error in CToken exchange rate calculation
signatures.fix: Initialize markets with minimum liquidity and use rounding-safe math for exchange rates

signatures.name: Sentiment Protocol Flash Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan inflated balance of underlying asset pool to manipulate share minting ratio
signatures.fix: Use internal accounting instead of balanceOf for share calculation

signatures.name: Deus Finance May Flash Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated AMM pool reserves to distort redemption price of synthetic stablecoin
signatures.fix: Decouple redemption pricing from spot AMM reserves; use TWAP oracle

signatures.name: Level Finance Referral Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Referral reward claim lacked proper caller validation allowing anyone to claim accumulated rewards
signatures.fix: Validate msg.sender matches registered referral address before allowing claims

signatures.name: Atlantis Loans Governance Takeover
signatures.root_cause: Governance proposal passed without quorum enforcement changed proxy implementation to malicious contract
signatures.fix: Enforce strict quorum and timelock on proxy implementation changes

signatures.name: Sturdy Finance Oracle Access Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Oracle price update function lacked access restriction allowing attacker to set arbitrary prices
signatures.fix: Restrict oracle update to whitelisted reporter addresses with deviation checks

signatures.name: Libertify Vault Approval Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Vault contract granted unlimited token approval to any address through unprotected approve function
signatures.fix: Remove public approve function; use internal allowance with operator whitelist

signatures.name: THORChain Router Exploit V3
signatures.root_cause: Router contract transferOut lacked verification of vault origin allowing unauthorized outbound transfers
signatures.fix: Verify msg.sender is registered vault and validate transfer against signed outbound memo

signatures.name: Zunami Protocol Admin Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Strategy setter function lacked timelocked admin check allowing immediate malicious strategy injection
signatures.fix: Enforce timelock delay on all strategy changes with multi-sig admin requirement

signatures.name: CoinEx Hot Wallet Compromise
signatures.root_cause: Hot wallet private key compromised due to insufficient key management infrastructure
signatures.fix: Implement multi-sig for hot wallets, threshold signing, and automated anomaly detection

signatures.name: Hashflow Quote Validation Bypass
signatures.root_cause: Quote signature validation could be bypassed by replaying expired quotes with modified parameters
signatures.fix: Include nonce, deadline, and full parameter hash in quote signature verification

signatures.name: Stars Arena Fund Extraction
signatures.root_cause: Share selling function allowed extraction of more funds than deposited due to missing balance validation
signatures.fix: Enforce strict balance accounting: sellShares must verify sender share balance before transfer

signatures.name: Maestro Router Approval Drain
signatures.root_cause: Router execution function retained token approvals post-swap allowing attacker to drain approved tokens
signatures.fix: Reset all token approvals to zero after each swap execution completes

signatures.name: Curve.fi Vyper Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Vyper compiler versions 0.2.15-0.3.0 had broken reentrancy guard allowing cross-function reentrancy in pools
signatures.fix: Upgrade Vyper compiler to 0.3.1+; add manual reentrancy locks independent of compiler guards

signatures.name: EraLend Reentrancy Attack
signatures.root_cause: Read-only reentrancy via callback during collateral transfer allowed inflating borrow capacity
signatures.fix: Apply reentrancy guard on all view functions used in borrow calculations; use checks-effects-interactions

signatures.name: Protocol Ungoverned Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: ETH transfer via call() before state update allowed recursive withdrawal draining pool reserves
signatures.fix: Follow checks-effects-interactions: update balances before external calls

signatures.name: Conic Finance Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Reentrancy through ETH callback during Curve pool withdrawal allowed double-counting of assets
signatures.fix: Add nonReentrant modifier and update internal accounting before Curve pool interactions

signatures.name: SteadyFi Vault Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Rebalance function called external DEX without reentrancy protection allowing vault state manipulation
signatures.fix: Add reentrancy guard on rebalance and validate vault invariants post-rebalance

signatures.name: Themis Protocol Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Borrow function transferred tokens before updating debt record enabling re-borrow within callback
signatures.fix: Update debt records before token transfer; add nonReentrant modifier to borrow

signatures.name: Abracadabra Degenbox Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: MIM token repay callback allowed reentrancy into borrow function inflating available credit
signatures.fix: Apply cross-function reentrancy lock covering both repay and borrow entry points

signatures.name: Revest Finance FNFT Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: FNFT minting callback re-entered deposit function before lock was finalized, minting excess FNFTs
signatures.fix: Finalize lock state before any external callback; add reentrancy guard on mint path

signatures.name: NFT Trader Reentrancy Exploit
signatures.root_cause: NFT onReceived callback during swap execution re-entered swap cancellation draining escrowed assets
signatures.fix: Lock swap state before NFT transfers; reject callbacks during active swap execution

signatures.name: Multichain anySwap Router Bug
signatures.root_cause: MPC key compromise combined with router logic flaw allowed unauthorized cross-chain transfers from pool
signatures.fix: Implement per-chain transfer limits, anomaly detection, and emergency pause with multi-party threshold

signatures.name: Exactly Protocol Market Logic
signatures.root_cause: Liquidation discount calculation used inverted formula granting attacker excessive collateral seizure
signatures.fix: Correct discount formula and add bounds check: discount must be within configured min/max range

signatures.name: Earning.Farm Withdrawal Logic
signatures.root_cause: Withdrawal amount calculation used totalSupply instead of user shares causing disproportionate payouts
signatures.fix: Use proportional share-based withdrawal: amount = (userShares / totalShares) * poolBalance

signatures.name: Socket Gateway Validation Gap
signatures.root_cause: Route validation did not verify destination contract address allowing attacker-controlled calldata execution
signatures.fix: Whitelist valid destination contracts and validate calldata against expected function selectors

signatures.name: Unizen DEX Aggregator Logic
signatures.root_cause: Swap function accepted arbitrary calldata for external calls without validating target or return value
signatures.fix: Restrict external call targets to whitelisted DEXes and validate expected output amounts

signatures.name: Pike Finance USDC Logic Flaw
signatures.root_cause: Cross-chain withdrawal finalization did not verify source chain message authenticity
signatures.fix: Verify cross-chain message signatures and source contract address before processing withdrawals

signatures.name: Prisma Finance Fee Distribution Bug
signatures.root_cause: Fee distribution used stale total debt value inflating per-user fee share calculation
signatures.fix: Snapshot total debt at fee accrual time; use snapshot value for proportional distribution

signatures.name: Munchables Proxy Logic Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Developer inserted backdoor in proxy initialization setting attacker as price feed manipulator
signatures.fix: Multi-sig control over initialization; audit all constructor/initializer storage slot assignments

signatures.name: Hedgey Finance Token Claim
signatures.root_cause: Token claim function did not validate caller against registered beneficiary list allowing arbitrary claims
signatures.fix: Verify msg.sender is registered beneficiary; use Merkle proof for claim eligibility verification

signatures.name: BonqDAO ALBT Oracle Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Tellor oracle price could be updated by anyone with minimum stake; attacker submitted inflated price
signatures.fix: Require multi-reporter consensus and implement price deviation bounds against TWAP reference

signatures.name: Lodestar Finance Oracle Attack
signatures.root_cause: plvGLP price oracle derived from manipulable on-chain ratio allowing collateral value inflation
signatures.fix: Use external price feed for wrapped/derivative tokens; add manipulation-resistant TWAP validation

signatures.name: Agave Lending GNO Oracle
signatures.root_cause: Single-source Chainlink feed for illiquid asset allowed price manipulation via thin DEX liquidity
signatures.fix: Require multi-oracle consensus for illiquid assets and set conservative LTV ratios

signatures.name: Aave V3 CRV Price Exploit Attempt
signatures.root_cause: Attacker attempted CRV price manipulation via concentrated selling to trigger bad debt in Aave market
signatures.fix: Implement dynamic borrow caps, position size limits, and real-time market impact monitoring

signatures.name: Jimbo Protocol TWAP Attack
signatures.root_cause: Protocol's floor price mechanism used manipulable TWAP allowing attacker to shift liquidity at favorable rates
signatures.fix: Use longer TWAP window and add minimum observation count before allowing liquidity shifts

signatures.name: Mango Markets V4 Oracle Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Perp market oracle could be influenced by thin orderbook allowing inflated mark price for borrowing
signatures.fix: Use median oracle with outlier rejection and enforce minimum liquidity depth for mark price validity

signatures.name: Inverse Finance DOLA Oracle Attack
signatures.root_cause: DOLA price derived from Curve pool virtual price which could be manipulated via large swaps
signatures.fix: Use Chainlink feed as primary oracle; use virtual price only as secondary with deviation check

signatures.name: Venus Protocol BNB Bridge Oracle
signatures.root_cause: Bridge token price feed had stale timeout of 24h allowing exploitation during rapid price movements
signatures.fix: Reduce oracle staleness threshold to 1 hour; pause borrowing if feed freshness exceeds threshold

signatures.name: Onyx Protocol CToken Oracle
signatures.root_cause: CToken exchange rate oracle manipulated via direct token donation to empty market inflating collateral value
signatures.fix: Seed markets with minimum liquidity; use virtual reserves to prevent donation-based manipulation

signatures.name: Stake.com Hot Wallet Breach
signatures.root_cause: Hot wallet private keys compromised through infrastructure breach enabling multi-chain fund drainage
signatures.fix: Implement hardware-secured threshold signing; limit hot wallet balances with auto-sweep to cold storage

signatures.name: Alphapo Payment Processor Hack
signatures.root_cause: Payment processor hot wallet keys compromised via social engineering of key custodian
signatures.fix: Multi-party key ceremony; no single custodian should hold complete key material

signatures.name: Atomic Wallet Key Extraction
signatures.root_cause: Wallet application stored encrypted keys with weak key derivation function vulnerable to offline brute force
signatures.fix: Use Argon2id for key derivation with high memory cost; encrypt keys with hardware-backed keystore

signatures.name: Mixin Network Key Server Breach
signatures.root_cause: Cloud database hosting kernel signing keys was breached exposing mainnet asset custody keys
signatures.fix: Use HSM-backed key storage; never store signing keys in cloud databases; implement key sharding

signatures.name: HTX/Heco Bridge Key Leak
signatures.root_cause: Bridge operator private key compromised enabling unauthorized asset unlocking across chains
signatures.fix: Multi-sig bridge operation with geographically distributed signers and rate-limited unlocks

signatures.name: Orbit Chain Bridge Key Compromise
signatures.root_cause: Centralized validator key set compromised; 7/10 multisig threshold met by attacker controlling validators
signatures.fix: Increase multisig threshold; distribute validators across independent organizations; add withdrawal delays

signatures.name: Poloniex Exchange Hot Wallet
signatures.root_cause: Exchange hot wallet private key compromised through supply chain attack on key management infrastructure
signatures.fix: Air-gapped key generation; supply chain verification for all key management dependencies

signatures.name: LastPass Crypto Wallet Drains
signatures.root_cause: Password manager breach exposed encrypted vault data; weak master passwords allowed seed phrase recovery
signatures.fix: Never store seed phrases in password managers; use dedicated hardware wallets for crypto key storage

signatures.name: KyberSwap Aggregator Key Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Elastic pool tick manipulation combined with precision rounding exploited concentrated liquidity math
signatures.fix: Add tick boundary validation and minimum tick spacing enforcement in concentrated liquidity pools

signatures.name: Hector Network Bridge Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Bridge did not validate source chain finality before releasing destination chain tokens
signatures.fix: Wait for source chain finality (minimum confirmation blocks) before processing bridge release

signatures.name: Multichain Executor Vulnerability
signatures.root_cause: Router executor could process withdrawal requests without MPC consensus due to cached session keys
signatures.fix: Require fresh MPC signing for every withdrawal; invalidate session keys after each transaction

signatures.name: Socket Bridge Route Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Bridge route verification accepted attacker-supplied route data without validating intermediate contracts
signatures.fix: Whitelist all intermediate bridge contracts; validate complete route integrity before execution

signatures.name: Synapse Bridge AMM Exploit
signatures.root_cause: AMM swap within bridge transaction used manipulable spot price instead of oracle price
signatures.fix: Use TWAP or oracle price for bridge AMM swaps; add slippage protection on bridged amount

signatures.name: Thorchain ETH Router Exploit
signatures.root_cause: ETH deposit handler did not validate memo destination matching actual vault address
signatures.fix: Validate memo destination against registered vault addresses; reject deposits with mismatched memos

signatures.name: Poly Network Executor Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Cross-chain message executor processed crafted messages that bypassed keeper signature verification
signatures.fix: Enforce strict keeper signature validation on all cross-chain messages with replay protection

signatures.name: Celer cBridge Message Spoof
signatures.root_cause: Cross-chain message authentication used weak hash allowing spoofed messages from unauthorized chains
signatures.fix: Use domain-separated signatures with chain ID binding for cross-chain message authentication

signatures.name: Allbridge LP Drain
signatures.root_cause: Bridge swap pool LP pricing used balanceOf allowing flash loan manipulation of exchange rate
signatures.fix: Use internal accounting for LP pricing instead of balanceOf; add flash loan guard on swap

signatures.name: Chainport Bridge Token Mint
signatures.root_cause: Bridge minting function accepted requests from deprecated validator set still holding valid signing keys
signatures.fix: Immediately revoke old validator keys during rotation; implement key sunset period with reduced authority

signatures.name: Tornado Cash Governance Takeover
signatures.root_cause: Malicious proposal contained hidden self-destruct and redeployment logic granting attacker full voting power
signatures.fix: Require proposal code audit period; implement proposal simulation; restrict delegatecall in proposals

signatures.name: Aragon DAO Treasury Raid
signatures.root_cause: Activist investors accumulated governance tokens to force treasury redemption at favorable terms
signatures.fix: Implement rage quit cooldown period; require supermajority for treasury disbursements above threshold

signatures.name: Beanstalk Flashloan Governance
signatures.root_cause: Governance allowed flash-loaned tokens to vote in same block as proposal execution
signatures.fix: Require token lock-up period before voting eligibility; snapshot voting power at proposal creation

signatures.name: Build Finance DAO Takeover
signatures.root_cause: Low participation threshold allowed minority token holder to pass malicious treasury transfer proposal
signatures.fix: Set dynamic quorum based on total supply; require minimum participation rate for treasury proposals

signatures.name: Swerve Finance Governance Deadlock
signatures.root_cause: Governance contract had admin keys revoked with no recovery mechanism leaving treasury permanently locked
signatures.fix: Implement emergency recovery mechanism with timelock and multi-sig override capability

signatures.name: Merit Circle DAO Investor Dispute
signatures.root_cause: DAO voted to revoke early investor token allocation through governance proposal bypassing legal agreements
signatures.fix: Encode investor vesting terms in immutable contracts; require legal review for allocation-modifying proposals

signatures.name: Compound Governance Bug 2023
signatures.root_cause: Governance-approved parameter change in reward distribution had arithmetic error overpaying claimants
signatures.fix: Simulate governance proposals with mainnet fork testing; add parameter bounds validation

signatures.name: Rari Capital DAO Shutdown Vote
signatures.root_cause: Post-exploit DAO shutdown proposal approved fund distribution with incorrect debt accounting
signatures.fix: Implement formal insolvency procedure with independent debt verification before any distribution

signatures.name: Lido stETH Governance Oracle Risk
signatures.root_cause: Oracle committee governance had concentration risk with majority of reporters from related entities
signatures.fix: Enforce geographic and organizational diversity requirements for oracle committee membership

signatures.name: Magnate Finance Rug Pull
signatures.root_cause: Admin set malicious oracle to inflate token price, borrowed against inflated collateral, then drained pool
signatures.fix: Remove admin oracle override; use decentralized oracle with governance timelock for any parameter changes

signatures.name: SwirlLend Multichain Rug
signatures.root_cause: Admin withdrew all pool liquidity using hidden backdoor function after accumulating TVL
signatures.fix: Remove all admin withdrawal capabilities; implement withdrawal governance with timelock and transparency

signatures.name: Ordinals Finance Rug Pull
signatures.root_cause: Contract owner removed all DEX liquidity and transferred to personal wallet after marketing campaign
signatures.fix: Lock initial liquidity with time-release; use LP tokens with vesting schedule; require multi-sig for removal

signatures.name: DeFiLabs BSC Rug Pull
signatures.root_cause: Owner minted unlimited tokens and dumped on DEX draining all liquidity from trading pairs
signatures.fix: Implement max supply cap in token contract; renounce mint authority after initial distribution

signatures.name: LunaFi Vault Exit Scam
signatures.root_cause: Emergency withdraw function had no access control allowing deployer to drain vault after TVL grew
signatures.fix: Restrict emergency functions to DAO governance with timelock; add withdrawal caps per transaction

signatures.name: Fake WLD Token Rug Pull
signatures.root_cause: Impersonation token with hidden transfer tax and sell restriction gradually extracted buyer funds
signatures.fix: Verify token contract source matches official deployment; check for hidden fee/restriction functions

signatures.name: Harvest Keeper Bot Rug
signatures.root_cause: Trading bot scheme collected deposits promising automated yields then drained all deposited funds
signatures.fix: Never deposit funds into unaudited yield contracts; verify on-chain yield source before participation

signatures.name: Nova Token BSC Rug Pull
signatures.root_cause: Owner gradually increased sell tax to 99% making tokens unsellable while continuously buying pressure maintained price
signatures.fix: Hard-code maximum fee limits in contract; make fee parameters immutable after deployment

signatures.name: SushiSwap MasterChef V2 Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Accumulated reward per share calculation overflowed uint128 in pools with extreme staking ratios
signatures.fix: Use uint256 for accumulated calculations; add overflow checks on reward accumulator

signatures.name: GMX Precision Loss Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Position size decrease calculation truncated precision in fee calculation granting attacker fee refunds
signatures.fix: Use higher precision intermediary calculations; round fee calculations against user (ceiling division)

signatures.name: Arcade.xyz Rounding Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Loan repayment calculation rounded down interest allowing micro-loans to accumulate zero-interest debt
signatures.fix: Enforce minimum loan amount above rounding threshold; round interest calculations up for borrower

signatures.name: JPEG'd pETH Precision Attack
signatures.root_cause: pETH minting calculation suffered precision loss when collateral ratio near boundary created free tokens
signatures.fix: Add minimum collateral buffer above precision boundary; use fixed-point math with sufficient decimal places

signatures.name: Vyper uint256 Compiler Truncation
signatures.root_cause: Vyper compiler silently truncated uint256 constants exceeding internal representation in certain expressions
signatures.fix: Upgrade Vyper compiler; validate all constant values post-compilation against source

signatures.name: Gain Protocol Fee Overflow
signatures.root_cause: Fee distribution multiplied reward by time elapsed without overflow check causing wrapped-around small payment
signatures.fix: Use SafeMath or Solidity 0.8+ checked arithmetic; validate fee amounts within expected bounds

signatures.name: Asymmetry SafEth Share Calculation
signatures.root_cause: Share price calculation divided before multiplying causing progressive precision loss on small deposits
signatures.fix: Restructure calculation to multiply before divide; use virtual shares pattern with large initial offset

signatures.name: Radiant Capital V2 Rounding
signatures.root_cause: Lending share to underlying conversion rounded in borrower favor allowing systematic extraction via repeated operations
signatures.fix: Round all share-to-asset conversions against the user; enforce minimum operation amounts above rounding threshold

signatures.name: Radiant Capital Flash Borrow
signatures.root_cause: Flash borrow did not lock collateral state allowing attacker to withdraw collateral during flash callback
signatures.fix: Lock all position state during flash borrow lifecycle; reject collateral modifications in callback

signatures.name: Gamma Strategies Flash Deposit
signatures.root_cause: Hypervisor deposit used spot reserves for share calculation allowing flash loan inflation
signatures.fix: Use TWAP-based reserve valuation for share minting; add deposit caps per block

signatures.name: Wise Lending Flash Pool Drain
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated Pendle PT token price used as collateral valuation in lending pool
signatures.fix: Use oracle-based PT valuation instead of spot DEX price for collateral calculations

signatures.name: Blueberry Protocol Flash Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan exploited incorrect oracle decimal configuration inflating borrowed amount valuation
signatures.fix: Validate oracle decimal configuration against token decimals on deployment; add sanity bounds

signatures.name: Shido DEX Flash Arbitrage Attack
signatures.root_cause: AMM swap pricing vulnerable to flash loan sandwich extracting value from pending transactions
signatures.fix: Implement anti-sandwich slippage protection and commit-reveal swap mechanism

signatures.name: Seneca Protocol stablecoin Flash
signatures.root_cause: Arbitrary external call in multicall allowed flash loan funded approval drain of user funds
signatures.fix: Whitelist callable targets in multicall; prohibit approval-granting calls to arbitrary addresses

signatures.name: Moby Trade Flash Vault Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan inflated option vault NAV allowing positions at artificially favorable strike prices
signatures.fix: Use time-weighted NAV for position entry; add flash loan guard on vault state-dependent functions

signatures.name: Compound Fork Flash Liquidation Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Flash loan funded price manipulation created artificial liquidation opportunities in Compound fork
signatures.fix: Use Chainlink oracle with heartbeat check; add liquidation delay for positions recently modified

signatures.name: Socket V2 Approval Exploit
signatures.root_cause: New route added without proper access validation allowed arbitrary calldata execution with user approvals
signatures.fix: Validate all routes against whitelist; require governance approval for new route additions

signatures.name: Concentric.fi Manager Drain
signatures.root_cause: Vault manager role compromised through social engineering allowing unauthorized fund reallocation
signatures.fix: Multi-sig requirement for manager operations; implement fund movement rate limiting

signatures.name: Playdapp PLA Token Mint
signatures.root_cause: Minting authority key compromised allowing attacker to mint 200M PLA tokens from authorized address
signatures.fix: Implement multi-sig minting with timelock; add per-period mint caps enforced at contract level

signatures.name: Abracadabra MIM Approval Bug
signatures.root_cause: CauldronV4 repayment function allowed using other users MIM approvals to the contract for own debt
signatures.fix: Validate msg.sender matches the approved spender; do not transfer from addresses other than msg.sender

signatures.name: NFPrompt Admin Key Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Admin private key extracted from insecure server configuration allowing fund withdrawal
signatures.fix: Store admin keys in HSM; implement withdrawal whitelist and per-transaction limits

signatures.name: BarleyFinance Proxy Upgrade
signatures.root_cause: Proxy upgrade function lacked timelock allowing immediate implementation swap to malicious contract
signatures.fix: Enforce minimum 48h timelock on proxy upgrades with public notification mechanism

signatures.name: Mozaic Finance Bridged Token Drain
signatures.root_cause: Bridge function accepted arbitrary calldata without validating destination allowing attacker-controlled transfers
signatures.fix: Whitelist bridge destinations and validate calldata against expected function signatures

signatures.name: Prisma Finance Migrator Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Zap contract migration function lacked input validation allowing flash loan funded collateral theft
signatures.fix: Validate migration parameters against sender position; add reentrancy guard on migration path

signatures.name: Raft Protocol R Token Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: R stablecoin minting callback re-entered position manager before debt was recorded allowing excess minting
signatures.fix: Record debt before minting R tokens; add cross-contract reentrancy lock on position manager

signatures.name: Pine Protocol NFT Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: NFT return callback during repayment re-entered borrow function creating duplicate loans
signatures.fix: Update loan state to closed before NFT transfer; add nonReentrant on all loan lifecycle functions

signatures.name: Clober DEX Order Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Order claim callback re-entered cancel function allowing double withdrawal of order funds
signatures.fix: Mark orders as claimed before sending funds; apply nonReentrant across claim and cancel functions

signatures.name: DistributedTown Staking Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Native token transfer during unstaking re-entered stake function inflating reward accumulator
signatures.fix: Use checks-effects-interactions; update reward state before native token transfers

signatures.name: DefiEdge Uniswap V3 Callback Reentry
signatures.root_cause: Uniswap V3 swap callback during rebalance re-entered deposit, inflating share calculation
signatures.fix: Add reentrancy guard spanning rebalance and deposit; calculate shares from pre-rebalance snapshot

signatures.name: PariFi Perpetual Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: Position close payout callback re-entered openPosition with stale pool state creating arbitrage
signatures.fix: Update pool state atomically before payout; lock position operations during settlement

signatures.name: MetaStreet V2 Reentrancy
signatures.root_cause: WETH unwrap callback during redemption re-entered deposit increasing withdrawal entitlement
signatures.fix: Process all accounting before WETH unwrap; add global reentrancy lock across deposit and redeem

signatures.name: ERC-2771 Context Reentrancy Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Trusted forwarder context combined with multicall allowed reentrancy via forged msg.sender context
signatures.fix: Do not combine ERC-2771 with multicall; use separate entry points for forwarded and direct calls

signatures.name: Particle Protocol NFT Logic
signatures.root_cause: Buy now function used ask price instead of current bid allowing purchase below market value
signatures.fix: Use max(currentBid, reservePrice) for buy now execution; validate against latest auction state

signatures.name: Telcoin Proxy Initialization
signatures.root_cause: Proxy migration left implementation uninitialized allowing attacker to call initialize and take ownership
signatures.fix: Call _disableInitializers() in constructor; verify initialization state post-deployment

signatures.name: Goledo Finance Liquidation Logic
signatures.root_cause: Liquidation bonus calculation applied to wrong base value granting excess collateral to liquidators
signatures.fix: Apply liquidation bonus to debt value not collateral value; add max liquidation profit cap

signatures.name: Convergence Finance Reward Logic
signatures.root_cause: Reward claim did not reset user reward debt after claiming, allowing repeated claims of same rewards
signatures.fix: Set rewardDebt = accRewardPerShare * userStake immediately after reward transfer

signatures.name: Uwulend Position Calculation Error
signatures.root_cause: Health factor calculation used wrong decimals for sUSDe token resulting in inflated collateral value
signatures.fix: Normalize all token decimals to 18 before health factor calculation; add decimal validation on listing

signatures.name: Normie Token Rebase Logic
signatures.root_cause: Rebase function had incorrect divisor causing extreme supply expansion and price crash
signatures.fix: Validate rebase factor bounds before execution; implement maximum single-rebase supply change limit

signatures.name: Lykke Exchange Withdrawal Logic
signatures.root_cause: Withdrawal processing system allowed concurrent requests to bypass balance check via race condition
signatures.fix: Use database-level locks on balance modifications; process withdrawals sequentially with mutex

signatures.name: OKX DEX Oracle Spoof
signatures.root_cause: DEX aggregator accepted spoofed price data from unverified oracle endpoint in routing calculation
signatures.fix: Verify oracle endpoint authenticity via TLS pinning; cross-validate prices against multiple feeds

signatures.name: Channels Finance LP Oracle
signatures.root_cause: LP token oracle derived price from manipulable reserves instead of using fair LP pricing formula
signatures.fix: Use Alpha Finance fair LP pricing formula: 2 * sqrt(r0 * r1) * sqrt(p0 * p1) / totalSupply

signatures.name: DForce Lending Oracle Stale Feed
signatures.root_cause: Oracle fallback mechanism returned stale cached price when primary feed timed out instead of reverting
signatures.fix: Revert on stale oracle data instead of using cached values; implement circuit breaker on staleness

signatures.name: Mean Finance TWAP Window Exploit
signatures.root_cause: TWAP window of 5 minutes too short for low-liquidity pairs allowing profitable manipulation
signatures.fix: Dynamically adjust TWAP window based on pair liquidity depth; minimum 30 minutes for low-liquidity pairs

signatures.name: Minterest Protocol Oracle Lag
signatures.root_cause: Oracle price update had 10-block lag creating arbitrage window during high volatility periods
signatures.fix: Reduce oracle update lag to 1 block; add volatility-based position caps during rapid price movement

signatures.name: Somesing Platform Key Breach
signatures.root_cause: Platform operational wallet key stored in cloud environment breached via credential stuffing attack
signatures.fix: Use hardware security modules for all operational keys; enforce MFA on all cloud access paths

signatures.name: Ripple Co-founder XRP Theft
signatures.root_cause: Personal wallet private key compromised through targeted phishing of password manager credentials
signatures.fix: Use hardware wallets with PIN; never store crypto keys in software password managers

signatures.name: FixedFloat Exchange Breach
signatures.root_cause: Exchange hot wallet keys extracted via vulnerability in third-party infrastructure provider
signatures.fix: Audit third-party infrastructure access; implement defense-in-depth with multiple signing layers

signatures.name: WazirX Exchange Multisig Compromise
signatures.root_cause: Gnosis Safe multisig signers compromised via malicious UI that displayed different transaction from signed one
signatures.fix: Verify transaction details on hardware wallet display; implement independent transaction verification channel

signatures.name: Chris Larsen Personal Wallet Drain
signatures.root_cause: High-value personal wallet secured with software key management vulnerable to credential compromise
signatures.fix: High-value wallets must use multi-sig with hardware-backed keys across separate devices and locations

signatures.name: Pike Finance Cross-Chain Spoof
signatures.root_cause: CCTP message processing did not verify source chain sender authenticity allowing spoofed deposit credits
signatures.fix: Validate CCTP message source address against registered bridge contracts on each chain

signatures.name: Alex Lab BTC Bridge Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Bridge oracle operator key compromised allowing fraudulent transfer authorization to attacker address
signatures.fix: Decentralize bridge oracle set; require threshold signatures from independent operators

signatures.name: XBridge Relay Validation Gap
signatures.root_cause: Message relay accepted expired proofs that had already been processed on a previous relay attempt
signatures.fix: Track processed message hashes in mapping; reject any previously relayed message proof

signatures.name: Wormhole VAA Verification Bypass
signatures.root_cause: VAA guardian signature verification accepted quorum from deprecated guardian set during rotation window
signatures.fix: Immediately invalidate old guardian set upon rotation; require new set signatures from rotation block

signatures.name: LayerZero Endpoint Config Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Application did not configure trusted remote addresses allowing messages from attacker-deployed endpoint
signatures.fix: Always configure trustedRemote for all supported chains; reject messages from unconfigured sources

signatures.name: Compound Governance Proposal 117
signatures.root_cause: Community proposal allocated excessive COMP rewards without proper economic modeling or cap enforcement
signatures.fix: Require economic impact simulation for reward-modifying proposals; enforce per-epoch reward caps

signatures.name: TrueUSD Governance Key Rotation Failure
signatures.root_cause: Governance key rotation process had gap period where old keys remained valid alongside new keys
signatures.fix: Implement atomic key rotation: old key invalidated in same transaction that activates new key

signatures.name: Nostra Finance Parameter Manipulation
signatures.root_cause: Risk parameter change via governance reduced collateral factor creating instant liquidation cascade
signatures.fix: Implement gradual parameter changes over multiple blocks; add max single-step parameter change limits

signatures.name: Arcade.xyz DAO Treasury Misuse
signatures.root_cause: DAO proposal to fund development included hidden retroactive payment clause benefiting proposer
signatures.fix: Require independent proposal review; prohibit proposer from being direct financial beneficiary

signatures.name: Indexed Finance Governance Delay Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Governance timelock reduced from 48h to 6h via earlier proposal enabling rapid malicious execution
signatures.fix: Set immutable minimum timelock period that cannot be reduced by governance proposals

signatures.name: BitForex Exchange Exit Scam
signatures.root_cause: Exchange drained hot wallets and ceased operations without notice after regulatory pressure increased
signatures.fix: Use proof-of-reserves; require regulated custodian for exchange assets above threshold

signatures.name: RiskOnBlast Presale Rug
signatures.root_cause: Presale contract had hidden owner withdrawal allowing deployer to drain all collected ETH
signatures.fix: Lock presale funds in timelock; require multi-sig for fund release tied to milestone deliverables

signatures.name: Gemholic zkSync Rug Pull
signatures.root_cause: Project claimed zkSync bridge issue prevented refunds while actually controlling all funds
signatures.fix: Verify refund mechanism independently; implement automatic refund trigger if milestones not met

signatures.name: Mango Farm SOL Rug
signatures.root_cause: Yield farm accumulated deposits then executed coordinated drain across multiple Solana program accounts
signatures.fix: Verify program upgrade authority is renounced or multi-sig controlled; time-lock deposits

signatures.name: NexFundAI Token Rug
signatures.root_cause: AI-themed token raised funds via social media hype then removed all DEX liquidity after 72 hours
signatures.fix: Lock liquidity for minimum 12 months via third-party locker; verify team identity via KYC service

signatures.name: Sonne Finance Precision Exploit
signatures.root_cause: Market creation with zero supply allowed donation-based exchange rate manipulation via precision overflow
signatures.fix: Enforce minimum initial supply on market creation; use virtual reserves to prevent zero-supply states

signatures.name: DeltaPrime Precision Rounding
signatures.root_cause: Borrow amount calculation rounded down debt shares allowing micro-borrows to accumulate interest-free debt
signatures.fix: Round debt share calculation up (ceiling division) for borrowers; set minimum borrow amount

signatures.name: Venus Protocol vBNB Share Exploit
signatures.root_cause: vBNB share to underlying conversion used truncating division allowing systematic rounding profit extraction
signatures.fix: Use ceiling division for redemption; track accumulated rounding dust and redistribute to reserve

signatures.name: Dolomite Margin Precision Loss
signatures.root_cause: Margin account operation accumulated precision errors across many small trades extracting protocol equity
signatures.fix: Use 256-bit fixed-point math with 36 decimal precision; periodically reconcile rounding dust

signatures.name: Flash Loan Share Inflation Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: flash loan inflates vault share price via donation before deposit to dilute other holders
signatures.fix: Use virtual shares with large offset; enforce deposit caps per block; internal accounting over balanceOf

signatures.name: Flash Loan Oracle Manipulation Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: flash loan manipulates spot-based oracle to inflate collateral for excess borrowing
signatures.fix: Use TWAP oracle with minimum observation window; add price deviation circuit breaker

signatures.name: Unprotected Initialize Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: proxy implementation left uninitialized allowing attacker to claim ownership via initialize call
signatures.fix: Call _disableInitializers() in constructor; verify initialization state in deployment script

signatures.name: Approval Drain via Arbitrary Call Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: contract with user token approvals allows arbitrary external calls draining approved tokens
signatures.fix: Whitelist callable targets; never allow arbitrary calldata execution from contracts holding user approvals

signatures.name: Cross-Function Reentrancy Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: external call in function A allows reentry into function B that reads stale state from A
signatures.fix: Use global reentrancy lock across all state-modifying functions; follow checks-effects-interactions

signatures.name: Read-Only Reentrancy via View Functions
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: view function reads intermediate state during external call enabling price manipulation
signatures.fix: Apply reentrancy lock to view functions used in pricing; or use snapshot-based pricing immune to mid-tx state

signatures.name: Divide Before Multiply Precision Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: division performed before multiplication causing progressive precision loss on small values
signatures.fix: Restructure math to multiply before dividing; use fixed-point libraries with sufficient precision

signatures.name: Empty Market Exchange Rate Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: first depositor in empty market manipulates exchange rate via direct token transfer
signatures.fix: Seed markets with dead shares on creation; use virtual reserves to prevent exchange rate manipulation

signatures.name: Stale Oracle Fallback Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: oracle fallback returns cached stale price instead of reverting when primary feed fails
signatures.fix: Revert on stale data rather than returning cached values; implement circuit breaker pausing operations

signatures.name: LP Token Fair Pricing Bypass Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: LP token priced from manipulable reserves instead of using manipulation-resistant fair pricing
signatures.fix: Use Alpha Finance fair LP pricing formula with external price feeds for underlying assets

signatures.name: Bridge Message Replay Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: cross-chain message processed without tracking consumed nonces allowing replay across chains
signatures.fix: Track processed message hashes in mapping; include chain-specific nonce and expiry in message structure

signatures.name: Bridge Validator Centralization Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: bridge security depends on small centralized validator set vulnerable to coordinated compromise
signatures.fix: Decentralize validator set across independent organizations; implement progressive security with fraud proofs

signatures.name: Flash Loan Governance Vote Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: flash loan acquires governance tokens to vote and execute proposal in same transaction
signatures.fix: Require token lock period before voting; snapshot voting power at proposal creation block

signatures.name: Governance Timelock Bypass Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: governance proposal reduces timelock period enabling rapid follow-up malicious execution
signatures.fix: Set immutable minimum timelock that governance cannot reduce; require supermajority for timelock changes

signatures.name: Hidden Admin Backdoor Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: contract contains hidden or obfuscated admin function that can drain all deposited funds
signatures.fix: Verify contract source is fully audited; check for owner-only withdrawal or self-destruct functions

signatures.name: Liquidity Lock Bypass Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: locked liquidity bypassed via secondary mechanism like token migration or proxy upgrade
signatures.fix: Use immutable LP lock contracts; verify no proxy upgrade or migration path exists that can unlock

signatures.name: Admin Key Single Point of Failure Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: critical operations secured by single private key creating catastrophic single point of failure
signatures.fix: Use multi-sig or threshold signing for all critical operations; distribute keys across independent parties

signatures.name: Hot Wallet Over-Funding Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: hot wallet holds excessive funds beyond operational needs maximizing loss on key compromise
signatures.fix: Auto-sweep hot wallet to cold storage when balance exceeds operational threshold; minimize hot wallet exposure

signatures.name: Incorrect Liquidation Formula Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: liquidation discount or bonus applied to wrong base value granting excess to liquidators
signatures.fix: Apply liquidation bonus to debt value; cap maximum liquidation profit; simulate with edge cases

signatures.name: Token Decimal Mismatch Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: calculations assume 18 decimals but token uses different precision causing valuation errors
signatures.fix: Always query token.decimals() and normalize; never hardcode decimal assumptions

signatures.name: Flash Loan Sandwich MEV Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: flash loan funds sandwich attack around victim swap extracting slippage value
signatures.fix: Use private mempool or commit-reveal scheme; enforce tight slippage limits on swaps

signatures.name: Unrestricted Mint Authority Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: token minting function has insufficient access control allowing unauthorized supply inflation
signatures.fix: Restrict mint to multi-sig with hard supply cap enforced at contract level; consider renouncing mint role

signatures.name: ERC-777 Callback Reentrancy Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: ERC-777 tokensReceived callback enables reentrancy in contracts not designed for hook-based tokens
signatures.fix: Add nonReentrant on all functions handling token transfers; or whitelist only ERC-20 tokens without hooks

signatures.name: Sell Tax Honeypot Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: token has modifiable transfer tax that owner increases to 99% making tokens unsellable
signatures.fix: Hard-code maximum fee in contract; verify fee immutability before purchasing; check for owner fee setters

signatures.name: Oracle TWAP Manipulation Short Window
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: TWAP oracle window too short for asset liquidity allowing profitable price manipulation
signatures.fix: Set TWAP window proportional to asset liquidity; minimum 30 minutes; add volatility circuit breaker

signatures.name: Deprecated Validator Key Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: bridge accepts signatures from deprecated validator keys during rotation transition period
signatures.fix: Atomically revoke old keys on rotation; implement zero-overlap key transition protocol

signatures.name: Low Quorum Treasury Drain Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: low governance participation allows minority token holder to pass treasury drain proposals
signatures.fix: Set dynamic quorum based on treasury value at risk; require supermajority for treasury proposals

signatures.name: Supply Overflow Rounding Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: repeated small operations accumulate rounding errors systematically favoring one party
signatures.fix: Track rounding dust separately; alternate rounding direction; set minimum operation size above precision loss

signatures.name: Concurrent Withdrawal Race Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: concurrent withdrawal requests bypass balance check via TOCTOU race condition
signatures.fix: Use mutex locks on balance-modifying operations; process withdrawals sequentially with nonce tracking

signatures.name: Unverified Cross-Chain Sender Pattern
signatures.root_cause: Generic pattern: cross-chain receiver does not validate source sender address allowing spoofed messages
signatures.fix: Configure trustedRemote mapping for all chains; reject messages from unregistered source addresses
